7.53: Yi kiitanchcha kushepp Xooss higga ekkeeza, zin kiitinttekkaya» yeegeeza. Isxifaanose shuchchar cadintteeza
7.54: Unttii yeya si7eez wode fa wozinayid Isxifaanosel afa gaame yilottii, fa achch dhaqii manddeeza.
7.55: Zin Isxifaanose Geeshsha Ayyanar kumii, salo udee bi7ii, Xooss bonchchonnee Yesuusa Xooss ushachch baggar eqqeezana be7eeza.
7.56: «Yeezako, taanii salo dooyinttin, As Na7ay, Xoossa ushachcha eqqeeza be7eeza» yeegeeza.
7.57: Qaala dhoqq udii ukkittar, fa haya tuccii wola eeko woxxeeza
7.58: Eza katamaypp gaxa kessii, shuchchar caddeeza. Markkattii fa ma7a pettii Saa7oola giz na7atithay kale gaddeeza.
7.59: Isxifaanose, «Ta Goda Yesuusa, ta shemppa ekkoba» yeegii xeegodar unttii eza shuchchar cadeeza.
7.60: Bunqittii, fa qaala dhoqq udii, «Ta Godayyo, yha nagara unttis atto goba» yeegeeza. Yey geezapp maaqqii yhayqqeeza.

8.1: Saa7oola Isxifaanose yhayiqayid ma7intteeza. Ye gallas Yerusalaame yez woosa keetha gita bayi7ith denddeeza. Hawaaritay attin ammanizitay ubbay Yihuda biittannee Samaare biitta laalintteeza.
8.2: Pettii pettii Xooss asitay Isxifaanose moogeeza; ma ees iita yeekkeeza.
8.3: Zin Saa7oola woosa keeth dhabisodayis koyiza. Kara kara yuuyii gelii, ammaniza dhiirathitannee maachchita goochchii goochchii kessii achch kara gelsseeza. Wonggilay Samaare sabbakintteeza
8.4: Laalintteez ammanizitay yhanigeez aqo ubbayid qaala odeeza.
8.5: Filphoosa Samaare katama yhanigii Kiristtoosa bagga asayis odeeza.
8.6: Gaame asay Filphoosa geeza si7eez wodennee E oothiza malabazita be7eez wode eza akaakii si7eeza.
8.7: Tuna ayyanitay uukkii gaame asaypp kezeeza; ma gaame gundditaynnee wobbitay bili7intteeza.
8.8: Ye katamayid yez asay gaame ufaytteeza.
8.9: Zin Simoona giz pettii athay ye katamitte yeza. E, «Taanii gita gita asi» gi Samaare asa kaayor yhay malabaziyegisittar gam7eeza.
8.10: Xiqqapp aykkii damma hellodayis yez as ubbay, «Damma Xoossa wolqqay yhaya» gi eza si7eeza.
8.11: Gaame wodepp aykkii kaayor Samaare asa malabaz giseez gishos asay eza si7eeza.
8.12: Zin Filphoosa Xoossa kaatetithannee Yesuus Kiristtoosa sunthibagga dhiirathitayisnne maachchitayis odin, unttii ebaz ammanii xammaqintteeza.
8.13: Ma Simoonakka ammanii xammaqinttii Filphoosara wola yhanigii be7eezi baz ubbayidannee oosintteez gita malatita bi7ii malabaz geeza.
8.14: Yerusalaame yez hawaaritay Samaare asay Xooss qaala ekkeeza si7ii Phixiroosannee Waannisa unttiko dakkeeza.
8.15: Phixiroosannee Waannisa yhanigii, ammanizitay Geeshsha Ayyana ekkodaygarkk unttis Xoossa woosseeza.
8.16: Abis giiko, Samaare asitay Goda Yesuusa sunthar aadda xammaqintteenepp attin unttapp pettayil afakka Geeshsha Ayyana haga wodhdhekka.
8.17: Ye wode Phixiroosannee Waannisa fa kushe unttal afa gaddin, unttii Geeshsha Ayyana ekkeeza.
8.18: Hawaaritay fa kushe unttal afa gaddin, unttis Geeshsha Ayyanay inggintteeza Simoona be7eez wode Phixiroosasinnee Waannisas miishe ki7ii,
8.19: «Taanikka ta kushe gaddeez ubbay Geeshsha Ayyana ekkoday garkk yha mawute taasikka inggoytte» yeegeeza.
8.20: Zin Phixiroosa eeko, «Neenii Xooss imota miisher woonggodayis qoppeezay gishos ne miishitir nena ekkii dhabo.
8.21: Ne wozinay Xooss tiina luulo maaqqekka gishos nees yhaydda shago woy qaada baaya.
8.22: Yikkee, yha ne wozina iitatithay gishos nagaraypp maaqqoba. Ne wozina yez iita qofa Xoossii atto goday garkk Goda woossoba.
8.23: Ne iita camo qinaaterannee nagara achcha yezaya taanii bi7iza» yeegeeza.
8.24: Simoona mahii, «Yi geezaypp pettakka tana hellaamay garkk taas goda woossoytta» yeegeeza.
8.25: Phixiroosannee Waannisa markkatteezayppennee Goda qaala odeezaypp guye Yerusalaame maaqqeeza. Samaare yez gaame heera Wonggile odeeza. Filphoosa Tophphe zhandarbana xammaqeez
8.26: Goda kiitanchchay Filphoosako, «Denddii sulle baggar Yerusalaamepp Gaaza kanggiza liizho biita ogayko yhanigoba» yeegeeza.
8.27: Filphoosa denddii qiteeza. Hinddeke giz Tophphe kaatatis I miisha ubba naagiza Tophphe as yeza. Eekka goynnodayis Yerusalaame qiteeza.
8.28: Gaarel bettii, Yerusalaamepp fa biitta maaqqittar nabe Isiyaasa maxaafe nabbabiza.
8.29: Geeshsha Ayyanay Filphoosako, «Ye gaarayko yhanigii kale shiiqoba» yeegeeza.
8.30: Yeezin Filphoosa woxxii yhanigii hellodar zhandarbay nabe Isiyaasa maxaafe nabbabodar si7ii, «Ne nabbabizay nees gelinee?» yeegeeza.
8.31: Zhandarbay, «Tana tamarisiza as baazin wayizii gelode?» yeegeeza. Gaarel kezii bettoday garkk Filphoosa woosseeza.
8.32: Zhandarbay nabbabiza maxaafay kifilay yhaya, «E dur garkk shukinttodayis laagintteeza; Duri na7a fa ikisa meedizitay tiina si77i gizay garkk, eekka fa doona dooyekkaya.
8.33: E kawuzheeza; ees geeshsh pirddakka dhabeeza. E yessay yha sa7aypp gachintteez gishos e sheeshibagga oonoo ododay?» yeegiza.
8.34: Zhandarbay mahii Filphoosako, «Nabe obaz odee? Fa bagga odinenee hara asibaz odee? Taas odooye» yeegeeza.
8.35: Filphoosa mahii, Xooss qaala ye aqaypp aykkii, Yesuusa bagga odiza Wonggile ees odeeza.
8.36: Unttii yhanigttar haathii yeza aqo helleeza. Zhandarbay, «Haathe yhaya bo7oba; ta xammaqinttamay garkk abi kaye?» yeegeeza.
8.37: Filphoosa eeko, «Neenii ne kunith wozinaypp ammaniko danda7iza» yeegeeza. E mahii, «Yesuus Kiristtoos Xoossa Na7a maaqqeezana taanii ammaniza» yeegeeza.
8.38: Gaaray eqqod garkk zhandarbay kiittin, nam7ay wodhdhii haatha geleeza; Filphoosa eza xammaqeeza.
8.39: Unttii haathapp gaxa kezeezan garkk Goda Ayyanay Filphoosa qoppekkazin ekkeeza. Nam7intha zhandarbay Filphoosa be7ekkaya, zin fa oga ufayttittar qiteeza.
8.40: Filphoosa Azaaxona oleeza. Ma Qisaare ye7oda hellodayis katamitayir yuuyii Wonggile markkatteeza.

9.1: Ye wode Saa7oola Goda kaalizita wodhodayis mandditar qeese halaqitayiko yhanigeez.
9.2: Goda oge kaalliza dhiirathitannee maachchita denggiko, accii Yerusalaame ko7odayis, Damasqqo yez Ayihude Woosa Keethitayis dabddaabbe xaafinttoday garkk eza woosseeza.
9.3: E yhanigii, Damasqqo katama hellodayis ukkodar, qoppekka salopp wolqqama poo7o e yuushayir poo7eeza.
9.4: E sa7a pokkeezazin, «Saa7oola, Saa7oola, abis tana bayithinnee?» giz qaala si7eeza.
9.5: Saa7oola, «Godayyo, ne oonoo?» yeegii oycceez. «Taanii, ne bayi7ith Yesuusa» yeegeeza.
9.6: Goday eeko, «Denddii katama geloba; ne oothodayis beezizabaza ezayid nees odinttoda» yeegeeza.
9.7: Saa7oolara oge yhanigiz asitay akkokka odinttekka eqqii atteeza. Giirth si7inttiza, zin oonakka benttowa.
9.8: Saa7oola pokkeez aqaypp denddii be7adar e aafay denggaam ixeeza. Yey gishos, unttii e kushayid aykkii kaalithii Damasqqo gelseeza.
9.9: Hayidzii gallas hellodayis E be7adayis danda7ekka; akkokka meekkaya; uzhekkaya.
9.10: Damasqqo pettii Hanana giz Yesuusa tamaaray yeza. Goday qoncithar, «Hananaa» yeegii xeegeeza. Hananee mahii, «Ta Godayyo, ta yhaydda yeza» yeegeeza.
9.11: Goday eeko, «Denddii luulo ginttinttiz oge yhanigii, Yihuda kara Saa7oola giz xersesepp ye7eez woos woossiz atha koyoba.
9.12: Ma Hanana ginttiz athay gelii, Saa7oola nam7intho be7aday garkk fa kushe ezal afa gaddodar qoncithar be7eeza» yeegeeza.
9.13: Hanana mahii, «Godayyo, Yerusalaame ne geeshsh asayil afa ye athay ab garkk iita baz ootheezako taanii gaame asaypp si7eeza.
9.14: Ma Damasqqo ne suntha xeegizita ubba accodayis, qeese halaqitay ees mawute inggeeza» yeegeeza.
9.15: Zin Goday eeko, «Saa7oola Ayihude maaqqekka asay tiina, kaatitay tiinannee Isreele asay tiina, ta suntha ersodayisnnee taas oothoayis maraxintteez miisha maaqqeez gishos ne eeko yhanigoba.
9.16: Abis giiko, ta sunthay gishos E waafa waaye ekkodayis beezizako taanii eza beezoda» yeegeeza.
9.17: Hananee yhanigii, kara gelii, fa kushe Saa7oolal afa gaddii, «Ta isha Saa7oola, ne ye7eez ogayil nees bentteez Goda Yesuusa, ne be7aday garkkennee Geeshsha Ayyanar kumoday garkk tana azazeeza» yeegeeza.
9.18: Ellisii, Saa7oola aafaypp pettii puqo garkkezibazay wodhdhin, Saa7oola nam7intho be7eeza. Ma denddii xammaqintteeza.
9.19: Katha mi miinggeeza, Damasqqo yez ammanizitayir xiqqa gallas gam7eeza. Saa7oola Damasqqo taamarsseeza
9.20: Ellisii Saa7oola, «Yesuusa Xooss Na7a» yeegii Damasqqo yez Ayihude Woosa Keethitayid qaala taamarsseeza.
9.21: Yeya si7eez ubbay malabaz gi, «Yhay Yerusalaame Yesuusa suntha xeegizita dhabisiza baasannee? Ma yhana ye7eezay unttan accii, qeese halaqitay tiina kanggodayis baasannee?» yeegeeza.
9.22: Zin Saa7oola qaala odor minggittar minggittar yhanigeeza. Yesuusa, E Kiristtoosa maaqqeezana milxxi udii odeez gishos Damasqqo yez Ayihuditay ees mahodibaz dhabeeza.
9.23: Gaame gallasapp guye Ayihuditay shiiqii, Saa7oola wodhodayis tobbeeza.
9.24: Zin Ayihuditay fana wodhodayis qoppeeza Saa7oola si7eeza. Unttii eza wodhodayis qammannee gallas katama penge naagiza.
9.25: Zin e tamaaritay eza qamma kanggii, gimbbe gase lukor daachchora wodhiseeza. Saa7oola Yerusalaame taamarsseeza
9.26: Saa7oola Yerusalaame helleez wode ammanizitayir walakinttodayis koyeeza. Zin E Kiristtoosa ammaneezay unttis tuma aazam ixxin ees yashitteeza.
9.27: Zin Barnnabaasa Saa7oola hawaaritayko kanggeez. Ogel Goday wayizii qoncceezakonnee nashsheezako, ma Saa7oola Damasqqo Yesuusa sunthayir yashittekka wayizii qaala odeezako unttis geeshshii odeeza.
9.28: Saa7oola Yerusalaame wutii Goday sunthayir yashittekka qaala odittar, hawaaritayira wolla yeza.
9.29: Ma Saa7oola Girike qaala odeez Ayihuditayra odinttittar palamiza. Zin unttii eza wodhodayis koyeeza.
9.30: Ammaniza asitay yeya si7ii, Saa7oola Qisaare kanggii Tersese dakkeeza.
9.31: Yihuda, Galilarannee Samaare ubbayid yez woosa keethitay saror yezeeza. Ma miinggeeza; Godayis yashittittar Geeshsha Ayyana minthathor gaanggii gaanggii yhanigeeza. Phixiroosa Liidarannee Yoophphe taamarsseeza
9.32: Phixiroosa gade ubba yuuyttar Liida yez ammaniza asitayko helleeza.
9.33: Ezayid hosppun layth muda silii arssal woyi7ii yez Eeniya giz atha denggeeza.
9.34: Phixiroosa, «Eeniya, Yesuus Kiristtoosa nena pathiza; denddii ne hiixa denthoba» yeegeeza. Eekka ellisii denddii eqqeeza.
9.35: Liidarannee Saarona yez as ubbay Eeniya bi7ii, Godayiko maaqqeeza.
9.36: Yoophphe katama pettii Xaabito ginttiz ammaniza asita yeza. (Xaabito guussay gen7e guussii) Iza fa yeza wode ubbayid lo77o baz oothitarannee manqqita maaddittar yezeeza.
9.37: Ye wode iza hargginttii yhayqqin, asay I aha meeccii, pooqeel afa kessii woyitheeza.
9.38: Liida Yoophphes kale yeza. Ammanizitay Phixiroosa Liida yeza si7ii, «Hayyana nuuko ellisii ye7oba» yeegiz kiita nam77ii asita eeko azazeeza.
9.39: Yey gishos, Phixiroosa denddii, unttara yhanigeeza. Hellii, pooqeel afa yez kifile eza gelseeza. Am7itay Phixiroosa kalayir eqqii yeekkittar Dorqqa unttara paxa yezar ootheez qamisitannee afilita ubba Phixiroosa beezeeza.
9.40: Phixiroosa unttan ubba bale kessii, gulbatii Xoossa woosseeza. Ma ahayko maaqqii, «Xaabite, denddoba» yeegeeza. Xaabita fa aafa dooyii Phixiroosa bi7ii, denddii betteeza.
9.41: Phixiroosa izo fa kusher maaddii denthii esseeza. Yeypp guye, ammanizitannee ami7ta xeegii, denddeezano u tiina ke7eeza.
9.42: Yha oday Yoophphe katama ubba helleeza. Gaame asay Goda ammaneeza.
9.43: Phixiroosa Yoophphe Simoona giz degelay kara unddenna gallas gam7eeza.

10.1: Qisaare, «Xaale ola asitay cuga» ginttinttiz ola asitay gancce pettii Qorineloosa ginttinttiz mato halaqay yeza.
10.2: Qorineloosa fa kara asayira Xoossa miinthii ammaniza asinnee Xoossa goynniza as. Ayihude manqqitakka gaame maaddiza, ma Xoossa ubba wode woossiza.
10.3: Pettii gallas uddufun saate heera Xooss kiitanchchay eeko yi7ii, «Qornneloosaa» gi xeegodar E qoncithar geeshshii be7eeza.
10.4: Qorineloosa dagammii kiitanchcha toli udii bi7ii, «Godayyo, abba?» yeegeeza. Kiitanchchay mahii, «Ne woosannee manqqita ne maaddizay Xooss tiina qofintteeza.
10.5: Yhatti Yoophphe as kiittii, Phixiroosa giz Simoona ki7isoba.
10.6: Phixiroosa abba kaler degela Simoona kara imathetithi betteeza» yeegeeza.
10.7: Qorineloosa paas odeez kiitanchchay yhanigin, fa ayllitaypp nam7itannee Xooss goynniza fa kale wotaaddaritaypp petta xeegii,
10.8: Unttis ubba baz odii Yoophphe azazeeza.
10.9: Wonttitha gallas unttii yhanigii, Yoophphe katama ukkodar usuppun saate heera Xooss woossodayis Phixiroosa pooqeel afa kezeeza.
10.10: E nayinttii kath maadayis koyeez, zin katha kaxxodar E ahumo be7eeza.
10.11: Salo dooyinttin, damma afila aazizabaz oyddii baggar aykkinttii wodhdhodar E be7eeza.
10.12: Ezayid oyddii toker yez mehitay, wora do7ita, ulora goochinttiza medhetithaynnee salo kafita ubbay yeza.
10.13: Ye wode «Phixiroosa, denddii eqqii shukkii mooba» giz qaala eeko ye7eez.
10.14: Zin Phixiroosa, «Godayyo, wa77a! Ta tuna baz ubbarakka mi eroowa» yeegeeza.
10.15: Ma, «Xoossay geeshsheeza neenii tuna giipe» giz qaala nam7intho eeko ye7eez.
10.16: Yeykka, hayidzii toke haneezaypp guye ye gita afila aazizay ellisii udee salo ekintteeza.
10.17: Phixiroosa fa be7eez qoncithayis bili7ithay, «Ab maaqqadeshsha?» gi fa wozinar qoppodar, Qorineloosa kiitteez asitay Simoona kara oyicichi denggii baler eqqeeza.
10.18: Fa qaala u dhoqq udii, «Phixiroosa ginttiz Simoona imathay yhaydda yenee?» yeegii oyceeza.
10.19: Phixiroosa qoncithar be7eezi baza qopithal afa yezin, Geeshsha Ayyana eeko, «Yeezako, hayidzii asitay nena koyiza.
10.20: Denddii wodhdhoba, taanii unttan kiitteez gishos se7ekka unttar yhanigoba» yeegeeza.
10.21: Phixiroosa asitayko wodhdhii, «Yi koyizay tanannee; yi abis ye7eenee?» yeegeeza.
10.22: Unttii mahii, «Nuna mato halaqay Qorineloosa azazeeza. E geeshsh, Xoossa goynniza asinnee Ayihude as ubbayid gaame bonchchintteez as. Qorineloosa, nena fa kara kanggii qaala neepp si7oday garkk geeshsha kiitanchchay ees odeeza» yeegeeza.
10.23: Phixiroosa asita kara gelssii mokkeeza. Wonttitha gallas, denddii unttara qiteeza. Yoophphe katama yez ammanizitaypp pettay pettay ezar wolla yhanigeeza.
10.24: Wonttitha gallas, Qisaare helleeza. Qorineloosa fa iginttannee fa laggita pettipp xeegii shiishii, Phixiroosa naagiza.
10.25: Phixiroosa kara gelod hanodar, Qorineloosa eza hellii e tiina xuggunii ees goynnodayis koyeeza.
10.26: Zin Phixiroosa, «Denddoba, taakka ta ommas ne garkk as» yeegii eza dentheeza.
10.27: Phixiroosa Qornneloosar odeinttinttar kara gelodar gaamay asay shiiqeeza denggeeza.
10.28: E asayiko, «Ayihude as hara gader pettipodayis woy woli hellodayis woga baza yi eriza. Zin taanii oonakka tuna woy geeshshi baaya gaamay garkk Xooss tana beezeeza.
10.29: Yey gishos, yi taako kiittin ixo bayth ye7eeza. Yhatti tana abis xeegiseezako taas odoytta» yeegeeza.
10.30: Qorineloosa, «Taanii yhayino oyddii gallasapp tiina yhannontte uddufun saate woosa woosodar, phooliz ma7o ma77eez as ta tiina eqqeeza.
10.31: E taako, ‹Qorineloosa, Xoossii ne woosa si7eeza, neenii manqqita maaddeezanakka qoppeeza.
10.32: Yikkee, as Yoophphe kiittii, Simoon Phixiroosa giza xeegisoba. E, Simoona giz degela athay kara aba doonar betteeza› yeegeeza.
10.33: Yey gishos, taanii neeko ellisii kiiteeza; ne yi7ithayir lo77o ootheeza. Yikkee, Xoossii nena Kiitteezibaz ubba si7odayis yhatti nuunii ubbay yhaydda Goday tiina yeza» yeegeeza. Phixiroosa nashsha
10.34: Kaallikka, Phixiroosa, «Xoossii as sino bi7ii asapp ase shaakkooya.
10.35: Zini duma duma biitta as ubba oona maaqqikokka paas yashittizannee xillo ooso oothizayid Xoossii ufayttiza taanii tuma akaakeeza.
10.36: Xoossay, ubba Goda maaqqeez Yesuus Kiristtoosa baggar sarotith odittar yha Wonggila Isreele asayis azazeeza yi eriza.
10.37: Waannisa xinqqatebagga sabbakeezaypp aykkii Galilapp aykkii Yihuda biita ubba hellodayis haneezibaza yi eriza.
10.38: Xoossii Naazirete Yesuusana Geesha Ayyanar tizheezannee wolqqa inggeeza. Xoossii eza yez gishos lo77o baz oothittar harggintteezita pathitarannee Xalahe kushe haarintteez ubba kessittar yuuyeeza.
10.39: «Ayihude biittannee Yerusalaame E ootheez ubba bazayis nuunii markkitta. Unttii mazqalel afa sottii eza wodheeza.
10.40: Zin Xoossii hayidzintha gallas yhayiqopp eza denthii asayis benttoday garkk udeeza.
10.41: Ye benttithay Xooss tiina maraxeez ees markka maaqqeez nuus markkatizapp attin as ubbayis baaya. E yhayiqopp denddeezaypp guye nuur meezannee uzheeza.
10.42: Nuunii Wonggile asayis ododay garkkennee paxa yezital afannee yhayqqeezitayil afa pirddodayis Xoossii shuumeezay Yesuusa maaqqeezana markkattoday garkk nuna azazeeza.
10.43: Xooss ammaniza ubbay nagaray, e sunthayir atto ginttinttiza nabitay markkatiza» yeegeeza. Ayihude maaqqekka asitay ammanii Geeshsha Ayyana ekkeeza
10.44: Phixiroosa haga oda haasekkazin qaala si7odar ubbayil afa Geeshsha Ayyana goggeeza.
10.45: Phixiroosar Yoophphepp ye7eez ammaniza dookalintteez Ayihude ubbay, Ayihude baazitalakka Geeshsha Ayyana gogeez gishos malabaz geeza.
10.46: Yeya godayis danda7eeza, unttii duma duma doonar nashshittarannee Xoossa galatodar si7eez gishosi. Ye wode Phixiroosa mahii,
10.47: «Yeyitititay ma nugarkk Geeshsha Ayyana ekkeezitay haathar xammaqinttamay garkk kayoday danda7izay oonoo?» yeegeeza.
10.48: Unttii Yesuus Kiristtoosa sunthayir xammaqinttoday garkk unttan azazeeza. Yeypp guye, unttii paar xiqqa gallas bettoday garkk Phixiroosana woosseeza.

11.1: Hawaaritayinnee Yihuda yez ammanizitay, Ayihude baazitaykka Xoossa qaala ekkeeza si7eeza.
11.2: Phixiroosa Yerusalaame yhanigeez wode dookalintteez ammanizitay,
11.3: eeko, «Neenii dookalinttekkazityiko gelii unttara katha abis meenee?» yeegii falameeza.
11.4: Zin Phixiroosa haneezibaz tiinapp aykkii maarar odeeza:
11.5: «Taanii Yoophphe katama Xooss woossittar ajuuta be7eeza. Damma afila aazizabaz oyddii baggar aykkinttii salopp wodhdhittar taako ye7eez.
11.6: Taanii dakkii be7adar oyddii toker yez mehita, wora do7ita, ulora goochinttiza medhetithitannee salo kafita be7eeza.
11.7: ‹Phixiroosa, denddoba, shukkii mooba› giz qaala si7eeza.
11.8: «Zini taanii, ‹Godayyo, wa77a, tuna baz woy geezhekkabaz ubbarakka ta doonako helii erooya› yeegeeza.
11.9: «‹Xoossay geeshsheeza neenii tuna giipe› yeegiz qaala nam7intho salopp ye7eez.
11.10: «Yey hayidzii toke haneeza, mahii ubbay salo fud ekintteeza.
11.11: Ye saatatekka hayidzii asitay Qisaarepp taako kiitinttii taanii yez kara helleeza.
11.12: Sidhekkazar unttara yhammadaygarkk Ayyana taas odeeza. Ma yha usuppun ishitay Yoophphepp taara Qisaare yhanigeezitayir Qorineloosa kara geleeza.
11.13: Kiitanchchay e kara gancce eqqii, ‹Yoophphe kiittii Phixiroosa ginttinttiz Simoona xeegisoba.
11.14: Nenannee ne kara as ubba ashshiza qaala E nees ododa› geezana Qorineloosa nuus odeeza.
11.15: «Taanii nashsha aykkodar Geeshsha Ayyana tiin nuul afa wodhdheezay garkk unttal afakka wodhdheeza.
11.16: Ye wode ‹Waannisa haathar xammaqeeza, zin yi Geeshsha Ayyanar xammaqinttoda› yeegeez Goda qaalay taas qopintteeza.
11.17: Xoossay nuus Goda Yesuus Kiristtoosa ammaneezitayis inggeez imota izo Ayihude baazitayisikka inggiko, yeezin Xoossa kayodayis taanii oonoo?» yeegeeza.
11.18: Unttii yeya si7eez wode fa palama ashshii, «Yeya maaqqiko, Xoossay Ayihude baazitaykka nagarapp maaqqii de7o yezoday garkk maaroteth inggeeza» yeegii Xooss galateeza. Anxooka woosa keeth
11.19: Isxefaanoosana yhayiqos heltheez bay7ithaypp denddeezayid laalintteez ammanizitay qaala Ayihuditay aaddas odittar pinqqe, Qoophiroosannee Anxooka hellodayis yuuyeeza.
11.20: Zin Qoophiroosappennee Qerenapp ye7eez pettii pettii ammaniza asitay Anxooka yhanigii, Goda Yesuusa Wonggile Girike asayiskka odeeza.
11.21: Goda wolqqay unttara yeza; ma gaame asay ammanii Godayikko maaqqeeza.
11.22: Ye oda Yerusalaame yez woosa keethay si7eez gishos Barnnabaasana Anxooka azazeeza.
11.23: Barnnabaasa Anxooka yhanigeez wode Xoossii fa aadho kehetithaypp fa woyayis wayizii inggeezako bi7ii ufaytteeza. Unttii ubbay fa kunth wozinar Godayil miinggii yezoday garkk unttan zoreezay:
11.24: Barnnabaasa Geesha Ayyanarannee ammanor kumeez keeha as maaqqeez gishosii. Gaame asaykka Goda ammaneeza.
11.25: Yeypp guye, Barnnabaasa Saa7oola koyodayis Xerseese qiteeza.
11.26: Ezayid Saa7oola denggii Anxooka ekkii ye7eeza. Barnnabaasannee Saa7oola woosa keetha asayira laythi muda bettii gaame asa taamarsseeza. Ammanizitay Anxooka «Kiristtaane» ginttinttii tiina xeegintteeza.
11.27: Ye wode pettii pettii nabitay Yerusalaamepp Anxooka wodhdheeza.
11.28: U ganccepp Agaboosa gizay denddii gade ubbayil iita naye dendodana Ayyana wolqqar tinbbite odeeza. Yeyi haneezay Oroome Kaatay Qalawudoosa wodaydda.
11.29: Ammanizitay ommar ommar fa wolqqay garkk miishe kessii Yihuda yez ammanizitayis maadee dakkodayis qofa acceeza.
11.30: Unttii yey garkk udii, miisha Barnnabaasalannee Saa7oolal woosa keeth cimitayis dakkeeza.

12.1: Ye wode Kaatay Herodoosa woosa keeth asaypp bagga bayithi aykkeeza.
12.3: Yey Ayihudita ufaysseezana bi7ii, gujjii Phixiroosanakka aytheeza. Yey haneezay boora Baale bonchchiza gallasitayida.
12.4: Phixiroosana aykkii acceeza. Paaziqa bonchchiza gallasitaypp guye woya tiina eza kessodayis qoppii, oyddii oyddii wotaaddaritay oyddii aqo naagizitay eza naagoday garkk aathii inggeeza.
12.5: Yey gishos, Phixiroosa achch kara naaginttiza. Zin woosa keeth asay ees miinthii Xooss woossiza. Kiitanchchay Phixiroosana achch karapp kesseeza
12.6: Herodoosa Phixiroosana woya tiina shiishodaypp tiina qamma Phixiroosa nam7i baggar nam7ii wotaaddaritay gancce santhalaater acinttii gentteeza. Naagizitay achch karay pengitayid eqqii naagiza.
12.7: Qoppekkazin Goda kiitanchchay qoncceeza. Achch karayid poo7o poo7eeza. Kiitanchchay Phixiroosa miyya bochchii barkkithii «Elle denddoba» yeegeeza. Izirakka santhalaatay e kushaypp wodhdheeza.
12.8: Kiitanchchay eeko, «Ne ma7a ma77oba, ne caammakka aathoba» yeegeeza. Phixiroosa yey garkk ootheeza; kiitanchchay, «Ne afar ma77iz ma7a ma77ii tana kaalloba» yeegeeza.
12.9: Phixiroosa achch karapp kezii kiitanchcha kaalleeza. Ees ahumo bi7izay garkk aazizapp attin kiitanchchay oothizabazay tuma aazekkaya.
12.10: Kiitanchchayirannee Phixiroosara tiinasannee nam7intho wotaaddara aadhii katama kanggiza biraata pengayiko helleeza. Pengaykka unttis fa aaddas dooyintteeza. Unttii kezii pettii husa ogel kezeezan garkk qoppekkazin kiitanchchay Phixiroosapp shaakintteeza.
12.11: Phixiroosas wozina maaqqin, «Ta Goday fa kiitanchcha kiittii, Herodoosa kusheppennee naagii betteez Ayihude as ubbaypp ashsheezana yhatti tuma ta ereeza» yeegeeza.
12.12: E yeya akaakeez wode gaame asay pettipp shiiqii Xoossa woossiza aqa, Marqqoosa giz Waannisa indat Mayramii kara yhanigeeza.
12.13: Ezayid baler eqqii xeegeeza. Pettii Rooda giz ooso asita penga ees dooyodayis ye7eeza.
12.14: Rooda Phixiroosa qaala maaqqeezana erii ufayisar kumii gazara dooyoda ashshii guye woxxii yhanigii, «Phixiroosa bale eqqeeza» yeegii asayis odeeza.
12.15: Asay iiko, «Neenii eeyinnee!» yeegeeza. Rooda Phixiroosa maaqqeeza geeshshii odeeza. Unttii, «Yey E kiitanchcha» yeegeeza.
12.16: Zin Phixiroosa baler eqqii xeessi ashshaam ixxin asay gazara dooyii eza bi7ii malabaz geeza.
12.17: Zin unttii si77i goday garkk Phixiroosa fa kushayir mallii Goday achch keethaypp eza wayizii kesseezako unttis qonccisii odii, «Yhaya Yayqqoobasinnee ammaniza asayis odoytta» gi ezaypp kezii hara aqo qiteeza.
12.18: Sa7a wonttodar «Phixiroosa ana qiteenee» gi wotaaddaritay woli gancce gaame walaseeza.
12.19: Herodoosa Phixiroosa koyisin, E benttekazay gishos naagizita qurii, unttan wodhoday garkk azazeeza. Yeypp guye, Herodoosa Yihudapp Qisaare wodhdhii ezayid xiqqa wode betteeza. Herodoosa yhayiqo
12.20: Herodoosa Xiroosa asayirannee Sidoona asayir wola morkke. Unttii biittay katha Herodoosa biittapp denggiza gishos unttii pettipp maaqqii e zhandarba Bilasxoosa paas cima udii dabbotodayis Heroodosakko yhanigeeza.
12.21: Herodoosa suntheez gallas fa kaatetith afila ma77ii, zufaanayil afa bettii asayis odeeza.
12.22: Asay, «Yey Xooss qaala, as qaala baaya» yeegii uukkeeza.
12.23: Herodoosa Xoossa bonchchekka gishos izira Goda kiitanchchay eza shocin guxiner minttinttii yhayqqeeza.
12.24: Zin Xooss qaalay diccittarannee dalggittar kiiteeza.
12.25: Barnnabaasannee Saa7oola fa oosa polii Marqqoosa giz Waannisa paar ekkii Yerusalaamepp maaqqeeza.

13.1: Anxooka yez woosa keetha nabitayinnee asitamaaritay yeza. Unttii Barnnabaasa, Karith ginttinttiz Simoona, Qerenapp ye7eez Lukosa, Kaatay Heroodisara dicceez Minaahennee Saa7oola.
13.2: Unttii Goda goynnitarannee xoomitarannee Geeshsha Ayyanay, «Taanii xeegeez oosayis Barnnabaasannee Saa7oola taas shagoytta» yeegeeza.
13.3: Yey gishos, unttii xoomeezappennee woosseezaypp guye fa kushayid unttal afa gaddii woossii dakkeeza. Barnnabaasannee Saa7oola Qoophiroosa yhanigeeza
13.4: Yey gishos, Geeshsha Ayyana unttana azazeeza. Selewuqe yhanigeeza; ezaypp markkabe gelii Qoophiroosa haathar teqintteez biita yhanigeeza.
13.5: Unttii Silmmana hellii Ayihude Woosa Keethitayid Xooss qaala odeeza. Waannisa maaddittar unttar yeza.
13.6: Unttii Qoophiroosa haathar teqintteez biitta kanthii Phaafu heliza wode pettii worddo nabe Bar-Yesuusa giz Ayihude ammita denggeeza.
13.7: Ye ammitay gade aqisiz Sarggosa Phawuloosa giz wozinaama athayira yeza. Sarggosa Phawuloosa Barnabaasanne Saa7oola faako xeegii Xooss qaala si7odayis koyeeza.
13.8: Zin Girike doonar ammitay sunthay «Elimmaasa» bilthay gade haarizay ammanamay garkk kayodayis koyii Barnabaasarannee Phawuloosar eqintteeza.
13.9: Zin Phawuloosa giz Saa7oola Geeshsha Ayyanar kumii ammitana dakkii bi7ii,
13.10: «Naati, Xalahe na7ayyo, iitatith ubbay kumeezayo, xillotith ubbayis morkkayo, luule Goda oga mirqiza ashshaamo?
13.11: Yeezako, yhatti Goday kach kushay neell afa yeza. Neenii qooqe maaqqoda; xiqqa wodes awa poo7o be7aamii» yeegeeza. Izir cagganannee dhuma e aafa goozin, fa kushayid aykkii kaalithiza as koyttar yuuyeeza.
13.12: Gade haarizay yeya be7eez wode Godaabaz tamaarssizayid malabaz gi ammaneeza. Barnnabaasannee Phawuloosa Phisida Anxooka yhanigeeza
13.13: Phawuloosannee ezar yezitay Phaafupp denddii, Phinfila yez Phergge markkaber yhanigeeza. Waannisa unttapp shaakinttii Yerusalaame maaqqeeza.
13.14: Zin unttii Pherggepp aadhii Phisida yez Anxooka helleeza. Maala gallas gallas Ayihude Woosa Keeth gelii betteeza.
13.15: Muse higgayid nabitay maxaafay nabbabintteezaypp guye Ayihude Woosa Keeth halaqitay, «Nu ishuntho, as minthathiza qaala yinttis yezako asayis odoytte» yeegii unttiko azazeeza.
13.16: Phawuloosa denddii eqqii fa kusher mallii, «Isreele asitannee, Xoossa goynniza Ayihude maaqqekka asayyo, si7oytta.
13.17: Yha Isreele asa Xoossay, nu mayzita dooreeza. Gibxxe biitta imathatithar unttii yezin, unttan gaanthii fa gita wolqqar Gibxxe biittapp kesseeza.
13.18: Liizho biitta oyttam layth maaqqoda unttan danda7eeza.
13.19: Kan7aane biitta Ayihude maaqqekka laappun kaatetithita haasii u biitta fa asa laatiseeza.
13.20: Yeyi ubbay oydd xeetannee ishatam maaqqad layth gancce haneeza. Yeypp guye nabe Sami7eela wode hellodayis daynnitay aqisoday garkk inggeeza.
13.21: «Yeypp guye, unttii paas kaat inggoday garkk woossin, Xoossii Biiname sheeshaypp Qiise na7a, Saa7oola oyttam laythi kawutoday garkk unttis inggeeza.
13.22: Xoossay Saa7oola shaareezaypp guye unttal afa Dawute kawutiseeza. Xoossay Dawute bagga markkattittar, ‹Taanii ta shene ubba oothiz ta wozina maaqqeez Issaye na7a Dawute denggeeza› yeegeeza.
13.23: «Xoossay, ‹Taanii Dawute sheeshaypp Isreele ashshiza ko7oda› gi qaala geleezay garkk Yesuusana ke7eeza.
13.24: Yesuusa ye7odaypp tiina Isreele as ubbay fa nagaraypp maaqqii xammaqinttoday garkk Waannisa qaala odeeza.
13.25: Ma Waannisa fa oosa wurssod hanittar asayiko, ‹Tana yi oona gi qoppee? Taanii yi naagiza Kiristtoosa baaya, zin taanii e caamma bilodayis taas beezowazay taapp guyer yi7iza› yeegeeza.
13.26: «Nu Ishuntho, Afraame sheeshuntho, ma yhaydda Ayihude baazin Xoossis yashittizitayo, yha atotitha qaalay nuus kiitintteeza.
13.27: Abis giiko, Yerusalaame yez asaynnee u halaqitay Yesuusana erekkaya. Maala gallas ubbayid nabbabinttiza nabitay qaala akaakekka gishos ezal afa pirddii nabitay odeez qaala poleeza.
13.28: Yesuusa wodhisodayis pettii sankkekka dhabin Philaaxoosa eza wodhoday garkk woosseeza.
13.29: Unttii Yesuusabaz Geeshsha Maxaafayid xaafintteezibaz ubba poleez wode mazqalepp eza wodhisii moogeeza .
13.31: Yeypp guye, E paar Galilapp Yerusalaame ye7eezitayis unddenna gallas bentteeza. Unttii yhatti ebaz asayis markkatiza.
13.32: «Xoossii nu aditayis immad geez Wonggile nuunii yinttis odiza.
13.33: Dawute fa Mazmuure Maxaafayid nam7intho shemppayid, « ‹Neenii, ta Na7a, taanii yhayino nena yeleeza› giinttintteezay xaafintteeza Yesuusa, Xoossii yhayiqopp denthii nu mayzitayis inggod geeza nuus u na7itayis poleeza.
13.34: E wooqqaamay garkk Xoossay yhayiqopp eza denthor erisodayis, « ‹Taanii Dawutes inggod geez ammanintteez geeshsh anjjo yinttis inggoda› yeegii odeeza.
13.35: Yey gishos, Mazmuure Maxaafayid hara aqo ma ‹Ne Xillay aha wooqqisaamii yeegiza.›
13.36: «Dawute fa wode Xoossa qofa poleezaypp guye yhayqqii fa aditayir mooginttii wooqqeeza.
13.38: «Yey gishos, ta ishuntho, nagara atotithay Yesuusa baggar tiinatii yinttis odintteeza eroytta. Muse higgay nagarapp xillisodayis danda7ooya.
13.39: Zin Yesuusa ammaniza ubbay nagarapp xilliza.
13.40: Yey gishos, nabitay geezay yinttal afa hellaamay garkk naaginttoytta.
13.41: « ‹Xoossay geezbaz leeqisizuntho! Bo7oytta! Malabaz goytta! Dhaboytta! oonkka odin, yi ammanoowa oosa taanii yi wode oothoda› » yeegeeza.
13.42: Phawuloosannee Barnnabaasa Ayihude Woosa keethapp kezodar, kaalliza maala gallasayid yeya gujjii ododay garkk asay unttan woosseeza.
13.43: Shiiqo laalintteezaypp guye gaame Ayihuditayinnee Ayihuditay ammanayid gelii Xoossa goynniza gaamitay Phawuloosannee Barnnabaasa kaalleeza. Ammaneezitay Xooss aadho keehatithayid miinggii yezoday garkk unttan zoreeza.
13.44: Kaalliza maala gallas katama yez asaypp oonkk attekka god hellodayi gaamitay Xooss qaala si7odayis shiiqeeza.
13.45: Zin Ayihuditay gaame asa be7eez wode Phawuloosa qinaattii e nashsha ixxii eza cazheeza.
13.46: Phawuloosannee Barnnabaasa yashittekkaya, «Xoossa qaalay tiinatii yinttis odinttodayis koshshiza. Zin yi qaala ixxii medhina de7o ekkodayis nuus beezooya gi yi, yi ommas pirddeez gishos yikkee nuunii Ayihude baazitayko maaqqoda.
13.47: Yeykka Goday, « ‹Alame kunithay ne baggar attoday garkk, taanii nena Ayihude baa woyas poo7o ootheeza yeegii nuna azazeeza› » yeegeeza.
13.48: Ayihude baazitay yeya si7ii ufayttii Xooss qaala bonchcheeza. Ma medhina de7os maraxintteez ubbay ammaneeza.
13.49: Goda qaalay ye gade ubba helleeza.
13.50: Zin Ayihuditay, Ayihude baazar Xoosse goynniza bonchintteez maachchitannee katama yez gita asita Phawuloosal afannee Barnnabaasal afa denthitheeza. Ye asitay unttan bayi7ith aykkii fa biittapp kesseeza.
13.51: Zin Phawuloosarannee Barnnabaasara ixxizitayis malla maaqqoday garkk fa toke buli7a tiqisii Iqoononnee katama yhanigeeza.
13.52: Ma Anxooka yez ammanizitay Geeshsha Ayyanarannee ufayisar kumeeza.

14.1: Kaseesaygarkk, Phawuloosannee Barnnabaasa Iqonoone Ayihuditay woosa keeth gelii gaame Ayihuditayinnee Ayihude baazitay ammanod hellodayis qaala odeeza.
14.2: Zin ammanekka Ayihuditay, Ayihude baazitay wozina laammii ishitayil afa denthitheeza.
14.3: Hawaaritay ezayid gaame wode gam7eeza. Unttii yashitekka Goday bagga odeeza. Goday malatitannee oorithabaz unttii oothoday garkk unttis mawute inggii fa aadho keehetith qaalay tuma maaqqeezana beezeeza.
14.4: Zin ye katama asay shaakinttii, baggay Ayihuditayir baggay ma Hawaaritayir maaqqeeza.
14.5: Ayihude baazitayinnee Ayihuditay fa halaqitayir wolla maaqqii hawaarita qohodayisinnee shuchchar shocodayis koyeeza.
14.6: Hawaaritay yeya erii, Lisxirannee Derbe giz Liqa7one katamitannee u heera yez biitta qosintteeza.
14.7: Ezayid Wonggile odeeza. Phawuloosannee Barnnabaasa Lisxirarannee Deriber
14.8: Yelintteezaypp aykkii nam77ii tokitay sileez yedhdhii eroowa pettii athay Lisxira yeza.
14.9: Ye athay Phawuloosa ododar bettii si7izazin. Phawuloosa eza dakkii be7adar paxodayis ees ammano yeza bi7ii,
14.10: fa qaala dhoqq udii, «Sitti gi ne tokayir eqqoba» yeegeeza. Yeezin, puthukk gi denddii eqqii yeth aykkeeza.
14.11: Phawuloosa ootheeza asay bi7ii u fa qaala dhoqq udii Liqa7one doonar, «Xoossitay as aazii nuuko wodhdheeza» yeegeeza.
14.12: Barnnabaasana, «Diya» gi, Phawuloosa yhaydda odar erintteezaya maaqqeez gishos eza, «Hermmeesa» gi suntheeza.
14.13: Katamaypp gaxa yez Diya giz eeqa kara kaahinay kormmitannee fudhe doosita hawaaritayis yarshshodayis kezii katama gaxa ke7eeza.
14.14: Zin Barnnabaasannee Phawuloosa yeya si7ii fa ma7a peedheeza. Asay gancce woxxii gelii,
14.15: fa qaala dhoqq udii, «Asayyo, yhaya abis oothee? Nuunikka yi garkk ase. Yha pathoowabazaypp salonnee sa7a, abbannee u gancce yez ubba baz medhdheez de7o Xoossayiko yi maaqqoday garkk yinttis nuunii Wonggile ododa.
14.16: E binii asay fa oge fa oge yhammaday garkk dakkii ashsheeza.
14.17: Zini ira salopp bukkiseeza, kathakka woder woder inggeez, kathi inggii yinttan gaame ufaysseeza, yeezii yinttis lo77o baz udii paas markka dhabisekka» yeegeeza.
14.18: Hawaaritay yeya gi paas asay yarshshaamay garkk waayer kayiseeza.
14.19: Anxookappennee Iqoononeppe ye7eez Ayihuditay, asa fa bagga mahii shuchchar Phawuloosa caddeeza. Unttis E yhayqqeezibaz aazin katamapp gaxa goochchii kanggii oleeza.
14.20: Zin ammanizita yi7ii, e yuushayid galchchii eqqeezazin E denddii katama geleeza. Wonttitha gallas Barnabaasar pettipp Derbe qiteeza. Phawuloosannee Barnnabaasa Soore Anxooka maaqqeeza
14.21: Unttii Derbe katama Wonggile odii gaamita ammantheezaypp guye Lisxira, Iqoononennee Phisida Anxooka maaqqeeza.
14.22: Ye katamitayid yez ammanizita mihithitara unttii ammanor minggod garkk zorttar, «Xoossa kaatetitha gelodayis nuunii gaame waaye ekkodayis beeziza» yeegii taamarsseeza.
14.23: Ma woosa keethitayis ommas ommas cimita dooreeza. Xoomeezayppennee woosseezaypp guye unttii ammaneez Godayis u hadara inggeeza.
14.24: Phisida biitta kanthii aadhii Phinfile yhanigeeza.
14.25: Phergge qaala odeezaypp guye Axaala yhanigeeza.
14.26: Yeypp unttii fa poleez oosayis Xooss aadho keehatithayis unttan hadara inggeez Anxooka markkaber maaqqeeza.
14.27: Anxooka hellii woosa keeth asa shiishii Xoossay unttara ootheez oosa ubbaynnee Ayihude maaqqekka asay ammanoday garkk unttis wayizii oge dooyeezako odeeza.

15.1: Pettii pettii asay Yihudapp Anxooka yhanigii, «Muse wogay garkk yi dookalinttaam ixxiko attodayis danda7ooya» gi ammanizita taamarsso aykkeeza.
15.2: Yey Phawuloosannee Barnnabaasa unttar gaame palamoday garkkennee wacoday garkk ootheeza. Yey gishos, Anxooka yez pettii pettii asay Phawuloosarannee Barnnabaasara Yerusalaame yhanigii Hawaaritayrannee cimitayir woli hellii ye oda billoday garkk qofa acceeza.
15.3: Woosa keethay unttan kiittin yhanigeeza. Unttii finqqe Samaarera aadhittar Ayihude baazitay Xoossiko wayizii maaqqeezako odeeza. Yey ammanizita ubba gaame ufaysseeza.
15.4: Unttii Yerusalaame hellin woosa keethay, Hawaaritayinnee cimitay unttan mokkeeza. Xoossay unttar ootheezi bazita ubba u odeeza.
15.5: Zin Ferisaawitay baggapp ammaneez pettii pettii asay denddii eqqii, «Ayihude baazar ammaneez asay dookalinttodayisinnee Muse higga naagodayis beeziza» yeegeeza.
15.7: Gaame odintteezaypp guye, Phixiroosa denddii eqqii, «Ta ishuntho, Ayihude baazitay Wonggile qaala ta doonaypp si7ii ammanoday garkk tiinatii tana Xooss yi ganccepp dooreezana yi eriza.
15.8: As wozina eriza Xooss Geeshsha Ayyana nuus inggeezay garkk unttiskka inggeezana markkatteeza.
15.9: Ammanor u wozina geeshsheez gishos nu ganccennee u gancce dummatith gaddekkaya.
15.10: Yey gishos, nu aditaynne nuunii tookkodayis danda7inttoowa qambbara ammanizitay morgayil gaddii yhatti abis Xoossa paace?
15.11: Goda Yesuusa aadho keehatithayid unttii atteezay garkk nuukka atteezana ammanoda» yeegeeza.
15.12: Asay si77i gi, Barnnabaasannee Phawuloosa Ayihude maaqqekka asay gancce fa baggar Xoossii ootheez malatitannee oorothibaz ubba ododar si7eeza.
15.13: Unttii nashsha haaseezaypp guye Yayqqooba, «Ishuntho, ta giza si7oytta.
15.14: Xoossii Ayihude baazitay ganccepp fa as doorodayis kezii unttan tiin wayizii qopeezako Simoona odeeza.
15.15: Nabitay qaalay yhayir qariza. Geeshsha Maxaafayid,
15.16: «‹Yhaypp guye, taanii maaqqoda, wodhdheez Dawute keetha denthoda. Laalintteez keethaka ta mahii essoda.
15.17: Atteez as ubbay taako ye7oda, taanii xeegeez Ayihude maaqqekka as ubbay tana koyoda.
15.18: Binipp aykkii yey erinttoday garkk udeez goday, tana› yeegiza.
15.19: «Yey gishos, ta qofay Xoossiko maaqqeez Ayihude baazita nuunii waayithaamay garkke.
15.20: Zin unttii eeqas yarshshinttii tuneezibaz maamay garkk, lagitaamay garkk, bawuta maamay garkkennee suuthii uzhaaminnee maamay garkk unttis nuunii dabddaabbe xaafodayis koshshiza.
15.21: Muse higgay binipp aykkii maalagalas Ayihude Woosa Keethi nabbabinttiza katama ubbayid sabbakinttiza» yeegeeza.
15.22: Yeypp guye, hawaaritaynnee cimitay woosa keeth as ubbayir wolla fa ganccepp xiqqa asita doorii Phawuloosarannee Barnnabaasara Anxooka dakkodayis qofa acceeza. Unttii unddenna erintteez kaalithiza nam7i asita Barssabaasa ginttinttiza e Yihudannee Sillaase dooreeza.
15.23: Yhay garkk ginttinttii xaafintteez dabddaabba unttal afa dakkeeza: «Nuunii hawaaritaynnee cimitay yi ishitay, Anxooka, Soorarannee Kilqqe yez Ayihude maaqqekka ishitayis nu sarotha kiittoda.
15.24: «Nuunii kiittekka asitay nu ganccepp yhanigii, ‹Yi dookalinttodayisinnee higge naagodayis beeziza gi› yinttan waayitheezannee yilotheeza nu si7eeza.
15.25: Nuunii dosiza Barnnabaasannee Phawuloosa doorintteez asayir wolla yinttiko kiittodayis pettii wozinar nu murtteeza.
15.26: Unttii nu Goda Yesuus Kiristtoosa gishos fa shemppo aathii inggeeza.
15.27: Yey gishos, nuunii xaafeezana unttii fa doonarakka gujjii yinttis ododay garkk e Yihudannee Sillaase azazeeza.
15.28: «Yha koshshizitaypp attin hara toofo yinttan toossaamay garkk nuunnee Geeshsha Ayyanay lo77o qofa maaqqeezana be7eeza
15.29: Eeqas yarshintti tuneezibaz miipatte, suuth uzhipatte, bawuta miipatte, lagite ayikkipatte. Yha ubbaypp yi, yinttan naagiko lo77o baz udiza. Saro yezoytta» yeegeeza.
15.30: Yey gishos, kiitintteezitay moyizinttii Anxooka yhanigii ammaniza asita shiishii, dabddaabbe inggeeza.
15.31: Unttii ye minthatho dabddaabba nabbabeezaypp ufaytteeza.
15.32: Ma e Yihudannee Sillaase u fa ommas nabita maaqqeez gishos ammanizita lo7ithii zorii minthatheeza.
15.33: Unttii Anxooka xiqqa gallas betteezaypp guye ishitay lo77or moyizin fana kiitteezitayiko maaqqeeza.
15.35: Ma Phawuloosarannee Barnnabaasar hara gaame asitayir wolla Goday qaala tamarssitarannee Wonggile odittar Anxooka gam7eeza. Phawuloosa Barnnabaasapp shaakintteeza
15.36: Xiqqa gallasapp guye Phawuloosa Barnnabaasako, «Nuunii Goday qaala odeez katama ubbitayid ammanizitay waafa yezako guye maaqqittar wola be7adannee eroda» yeegeeza.
15.37: Barnnabaasa Marqqoosa ginttinttiza Waannisa paar yhanigoday garkk koyeeza.
15.38: Zin Phawuloosa Marqqoosa paar yhanigoday garkk koyekkaya. Yeykka, E Phinfila shaakinttii unttar oothodayis yhanigekka gishosi.
15.39: U gancce iita kachchii kezin pettay pettaypp shaakintteeza. Barnnabaasa Marqqoosa ekkii markkaber Qoophiroosa kezeeza.
15.40: Zin Phawuloosa Sillaasena dooreeza; ammanizitay Phawuloosa Xooss aadho keehatithayis hadara inggeezaypp guye e qiteeza.
15.41: Yeezii, woosa keethita minthathittar Soorarannee Kilqara aadheeza.

16.1: Phawuloosa Derbbennee Lisxira heleeza. Ezayid Ximaatoosa giz ammaniza as yeza. E indatakka ammaniza Ayihude maachch, e aday Girike asii.
16.2: Lisxirarannee Iqonoone yez ammizitay Ximaatoosa bagga lo7ithii markkatteeza.
16.3: Phawuloosa Ximaatoosa paar kanggodayis koyeeza, eez aday Girike as maaqqeeza ye aqo yez Ayihude ubbay eriza gishos eza dookaleeza.
16.4: Unttii katamitayira yhanigttar Yerusalaame yez hawaaritaynnee cimitay acceez qofa ammanizitay naagoday garkk unttis odittar aadheeza.
16.5: Yey gishos, woosa keethitay ammanor minggittar, payidorakka gallas gallas gaanggii gaanggii yhanigeeza. Phawuloosa Maqadoona yhammadaygarkk xeegintteeza
16.6: Iisiya qaala odaamay garkk Geeshsha Ayyanay unttan kayeez gishos Phirgerannee Galata biittar aadheeza.
16.7: Unttii Miisa zawa helleez wode Bitaana yhammadayis butintteeza. Zin Yesuusa Ayyanay unttan kayeeza.
16.8: Yey gishos, unttii Miisa kanttar aadhittar Xiro7aada wodhdheeza.
16.9: Phawuloosa qamma qoncithar pettii Maqadoona as faako, «Maqadoona piinggii nuna maaddooye» yeegttar eqqii woosodar be7eeza.
16.10: Ajuuta E be7eezaypp guye ellisii nuunii Maqadoona yhammadayis koyeeza. Yeykka, Wonggile ezayid yez asayis ododayis Xoossay nuna xeegeez aazeeza. Liida Kiristtoosa ammaneeza
16.11: Xiro7aadapp denddii markkabe gelii Samotiraaqe yhanigeeza, wonttitha gallas Naaphule yhanigeeza.
16.12: Yeypp denddii Maqadoona biitta yez Filphisoosa giz erintteez worada katama yhanigeeza. Ma Filphisoosa Oroome kaatay olar mooddeez katama. Nuunii ye katamayid xiqqa gallas betteeza.
16.13: Maala gallas katamaypp gaxa borkka kale Ayihuditay Xooss woossiza aqo yezana qoppii ged yhanigeeza. Ye aqayid shiiqeez maachchitayis qaala odeeza.
16.14: Nuna si7odar asaypp pettii Liida ginttinttiz Tiyatiroona katamapp ye7eeza, Xooss ammaneeza zoqo afila zal7iza, asita yeza. Phawuloosa odiza iza si7oday garkk Goday I wozina dooyeeza.
16.15: Liida fa kara asayir pettipp xammaqintteezaypp guye nuuko, «Yi tana Goda tuma ammaneeza giiko ta kara yi7ii yezoytta» gi miinthii wooseeza. Phawuloosarannee Sillaasera accintteeza
16.16: Nuunii Xoossa woossiza aqa yhammadar iita ayyana iil afa yezanna kaayor fa goditayi gaame miishe ki7iz pettii ayllata nuna heleeza.
16.17: Phawuloosannee nuna kaallii, «Yhaytitay Ubbaypp afa Xooss ayllita! Unttii yi attoda oga odizita» gi uukkeeza.
16.18: Ubba gallas yey garkk giza. Zini Phawuloosa yilottii guye maaqqii, ye ayyana, «Yesuus Kiristtoosa sunthayir izippe kezoba» gi azazeeza. Izirakka iita ayyanay izippe kezeeza.
16.19: Zin I godittay u miishe denggiz ogay dhabeeza bi7ii, Phawuloosannee Sillaase aykkii, awudare dayinnitay tiina goochchii kanggeeza.
16.20: Dayinnitay tiina u kanggii, «Yhayititay Ayihude as maaqqittar nu katama asa iita waayithiza.
16.21: Nuunii Oroome gade as maaqqodar ekkodayisinnee oothodayis woga baabaz taamarssiza» yeegeeza.
16.22: Asay pettii bagga maaqqii, Phawuloosal afannee Sillaasel afa denddeeza. Dayinnitay u afila qaarii gufer unttan shocoday garkk azazeeza.
16.23: Unttan gaame yhadhdheezaypp guye achch kara geliseeza. Achch keetha naagizay unttan miinthii naagod garkk azazeeza.
16.24: Achch kara naagizay ye kiita ekkii, Phawuloosannee Sillaase achch karayis qol7a gelisseeza. U toka duthar duuxeeza.
16.25: Zin giddii bilahe maaqqodar Phawuloosarannee Sillaasera woossittarannee mazimure yexxittar Xoossa galattiza. Achch kara yez hara asitaykka unttii gizibaz si7iza.
16.26: Qoppekka achch kara baasay eni7od hellodayis biitta eni7o maaqqeeza. Ye saatatekka penge ubbay dooyintteeza; accintteez as ubba santhalaatay bilintti wodhdheeza.
16.27: Achch kara naagizay genttapp barkkodar achch kara penge ubbay dooyintteeza bi7ii achch asay kezii qiteeza aazin fana wodhodayis mashsha ekkeeza.
16.28: Zin Phawuloosa qaala dhoqq udii «Nu ubbay yhaydda yeza nena qohippe» yeegeeza.
16.29: Achch kara naagizay xomppe woossii ekkii ellisii gancce laasii Kukkorittar Phawuloosa tiinannee Sillaase tiina xugguneeza.
16.30: Unttan bale kessii, «Ta goditayyo, taanii attodayis ab udodayis beezee?» yeegeeza.
16.31: Phawuloosarannee Sillaaser eziko, «Goda Yesuus Kiristtoosa ammanoba; neerannee ne kara asayira attoda» yeegeeza.
16.32: Unttii eesinnee e kara yez ubbayis Goday qaala odeeza.
16.33: Qamma ye saatatekka achch kara naagizay unttan kanggii u sambara meecceeza. Ellisii fa kara as ubbayir xammaqintteeza.
16.34: Phawuloosannee Sillaase fa kara kanggii unttis katha aatheeza. E fa kara as ubbayir Xooss ammaneez gishos ufaytteeza.
16.35: Sa7ay wonttin daynnitay, «Ye asita bili7oba» yeegii poolise halaqita eziko azazeeza.
16.36: Achch kara naagizay, «Yi bilinttodaygarkk daynnitay azazeeza. Yikkee, kezii saro yhanigoytta» yeegii ye kiita Phawuloosas odeeza.
16.37: Zin Phawuloosa ye poolise halaqitayko, «Nuunii Oroome as maaqqadar unttii nuna pirdda bagga asay tiina yhadhdhii, achch kara oleeza. Yhatt nuna geemar kezii qito ginee? Hanena, unttii fa ommas yi7ii nuna kesso» yeegeeza.
16.38: Poolise halaqitay daynnayis yeya odin, Phawuloosarannee Sillaasera Oroome gade as maaqqeeza si7eez wode yashitteeza.
16.39: Yey gishos, daynnitay yi7ii unttiko, «Nuunii yinttan qoheeza» geeza. Achch karapp bale unttan kessii, katamaypp kezii qitodaygarkk woosseeza.
16.40: Phawuloosarannee Sillaasera achch karapp kezii Liida kara yhanigeeza. Ezayid ammanizita hellii unttan minthathii kezii qiteeza.

17.1: Phawuloosarannee Sillaasera Amfipholiinarannee Apholoonar aadhii Teselonqqe yhanigeeza. Ezayid Ayihude Woosa Keethi yeza.
17.2: Phawuloosa kaseesay garkk ezayid geleeza. Ezayid hayidzii saamintta Xooss qaalapp asayis odeeza.
17.3: Kiristtoosa waaye ekkodayisinnee yhayiqopp dendodayis beezizana unttis qonccer odittar, «Yesuusa yha taanii yinttis odizay Kiristtoosa» yeegeeza.
17.4: Unttapp pettay pettay oday tuma maaqqeezana ma77ii Phawuloosarannee Sillaasera tobbeeza. Yey garkkekka, Xoossa goyinniza gaame Girike asaynnee gaame bonchchintteez maachchitaykka unttar tobbeeza.
17.5: Zin Ayihuditay qinaattii azaliza iita asita gabe ogepp shiisheeza. Katama gancce cabbo medhdheeza; Phawuloosannee Sillaase asayis aathii immadayis kezii Yaasona kara ellis qiteeza.
17.6: Phawuloosannee Sillaase unttis benttaam ixxin, Yaasonennee ishitaypp pettii pettii ammanizita katama halaqitayiko goochchii kanggii, «Yeyititay biita ubba buqqizitay yhatti ma nuuko ye7eeza.
17.7: Yaasone unttan fa kara gaddeeza. Yhayititay, ‹Yesuusa giz hara kaatay yeza› gi Qeesare kiita ixxizita» yeegii uukkeeza.
17.8: Shiiqeez asaynnee katama halaqitay yeya si7in ezis hanod baz dhabeeza.
17.9: Halaqitay Yaasonannee harita waaser bili7eeza. Phawuloosannee Sillaase Beera gade taamarsseeza
17.10: Ammanizitay Phawuloosannee Sillaase qammar Beera dakkeeza. Beera hellii, Ayihude Woosa Keethi geleeza.
17.11: Beera asitay Teselonqqe asitaypp aadheez wozina luulita. Unttii qaala kunth wozinapp ekkeeza; gallas gallas Geeshsha Maxaafita nabbabitar Phawuloosa geezay tuma maaqqeezana shaakkii ereeza.
17.12: Yey gishos, unttapp gaamitay, Girikitayppekka bonchchintteez xiqqa maachchitaynnee dhiirathitay ammaneeza.
17.13: Zin Teselonqqe yez Ayihuditay Phawuloosa Xooss qaala Beera gaddekka odeezana si7ii Beera yi7ii asa buqeeza.
17.14: Yeypp guye, ammanizitay ellisii Phawuloosa abba kale dakkeeza. Zin Sillaasennee Ximaatoosa Beera atteeza.
17.15: Phawuloosana moyizeez asay Ateena helthii ashsheeza. Ye asay Sillaasennee Ximaatoosa unttis danda7inttiko ellsii faako ye7od garkk Phawuloosa kiitteez kiita ekkii Beera maaqqeeza. Phawuloosa Ateena biittal
17.16: Phawuloosa Ateena Sillaasenannee Ximaatoosa naagttar, katamay eeqar kumeezana bi7ii shentteeza.
17.17: Yey gishos, Ayihude Woosa keetha Ayihuditayirannee Xoossa goynniza Ayihude maaqqekka asayir ma gabelakka fana heleez asayir ubba wode palamiza.
17.18: Ephiqoroosa baggapennee Isttoykantta ginttinttiz eranchitaypp pettay pettay Phawuloosar palameeza. Unttapp pettay pettay, «Yha doonanchay ab ododayis koyineshsha?» yeegeeza. Yhankkitay Phawuloosa Yesuusannee yhayiqopp denddo bagga unttis odeez gishos «Oroth eeqitay bagga odiz aaziza» yeegeeza.
17.19: Phawuloosa aykkii Aryoospagoosa ginttiz shiiqo aqa kanggii, «Yha neenii taamarssiza orothibazay abizako nuna erisaamoo?
17.20: Abis giiko, neenii nuus orothibaz odizay; abizako nuunii erodayis koyiza» yeegeeza.
17.21: Ateena as ubbaynnee ezayid yez imathitay orothibaz odinttekazarannee si7ekka peezhooya.
17.22: Phawuloosa Aryoospagoosa shiiqeez asay tiina eqqii, «Ateena asayyo, yi Xoossitayis ubba bazar gaame yashittiza taanii bi7iza.
17.23: Taanii yi katamayir yuuyttar yi goynniza aqita be7adar ‹Erinttoowa Xoossis› ginttinttii xaafintteez yarshsho aqo denggeeza. Yha yi erekkazar goynnizana taanii yinttis odiza.
17.24: Sa7annee sa7all yez ubba baz medhdheez Xoossay, salonnee sa7a Goday, asii keexxeez keetha yezooya.
17.25: E de7onnee, shempponnee ubba baz as ubbayis inggiza gishos pacce yez as garkk as maadee koyooya.
17.26: Asii yezod wodayisnnee aqayis zawa inggeeza. Xoossay as zerithi ubba pettii athaypp medhdhii biita ubbayid gaddeeza.
17.27: E yeya ootheezay asii eza koyoday garkkennee koyii demmaday garkkesii. Hanikokka E nuupp haakkekkaya.
17.28: Yinttipp pettii pettii yexxizitay, ‹Nuunii e na7ita› geezay garkk, Nuunii ezayid pathi yezii, eni7iza.
17.29: Yikkee, nuunii Xooss na7ita maaqqiz gishos ‹Xoossay as ecetitharannee qofar worqqapp woy birapp woy shuchchapp oosintteezibaz aaziza› yeegii qoppodayis beezooya.
17.30: Yey gishos, Xoossii tiina asay erekka ootheezana ashshii aadheeza, zin yhatti ubba aqo yez as ubbay nagarapp maaqqoday garkk azaziza.
17.31: Abis giiko, Xoossii fa dooreez athayir sa7all yez as ubbayil afa xillo pirdda pirddodayis qamma giigisii gaddeeza. Eza yhayiqopp denthii yeya as ubbayis tumaseeza» yeegeeza.
17.32: Unttapp pettii pettii asitay yhayiqopp denddo bagga Phawuloosapp si7ii, ezal afa ari7eeza. Zin yhankkitay, «Nuunii yeya neepp gujjii si7odayis koyiza» yeegeeza.
17.33: Yey gishos, Phawuloosa u ganccepp kezeeza.
17.34: Zin pettii pettii dhiithitay Phawuloosa hellii ammaneeza. U ganccepp Aryoospagoosa pirdde daynna Diyonasoosa ginttiz asita, Damarsso ginttiz pettii asttinnee yhankkitay yeza.

18.1: Yeypp guye, Phawuloosa Ateenapp kezii, Qoronttoosa qiteeza.
18.2: Ezayid Aqiila ginttiz Phanxoosa yelintteez pettii Ayihude as denggeeza. Ayihude as ubbay Oroomeppe kezoday garkk kaatay Qalawudoosa kiitteez gishos xiqqa wodepp tiina E fa machchat Phirisqilar Ixaalepp ye7eeza. Phawuloosa unttan hellodayis ye7eeza.
18.3: E oosay unttiisay garkk dunkkaane siko maaqqeez gishos unttar bettii wolla ootheeza.
18.4: Phawuloosa maala gallas ubbayid Ayihuditannee Girikita ammanthodayis Ayihude Woosa keetha unttar odinttiza.
18.5: Sillaasennee Ximaatoosa Meqidonapp yi7in Phawuloosa fa wode ubba inggii Ayihuditayis Yesuusa E, Kiristtoosa gi azala bayth markkattitar qaala odeeza.
18.6: Zin unttii Phawuloosana ixxii eza cazhin Phawuloosa fa afilaypp buli7a tiqqisttar, «Yi suuthayis yinttan oyico; taanii yhanpp geeshsh. Yhanpp maaqqii, taanii Ayihude maaqqekka asayiko yhammada» yeegeeza.
18.7: Yeypp kezii Xooss goynniza Titosa Yosxoosa giz athay kara yhanigeeza. Yosxoosa karay Ayihude Woosa Keethay kale yeza.
18.8: Ayihude Woosa Keeth halaqay Qarisphoosa fa kara as ubbayir Goda ammaneeza. Qoronttoosa asitayppekka gaamitay Xooss qaala si7eez wode ammanii xammaqintteeza.
18.9: Goday pettii qamma Phawuloosas qoncithar yi7ii, «Yashitippe; odobapp attin si77i giipe.
18.10: Taanii neer yeza. Taas yha katamayid, gaame as yez gishos nena qohi iita baz oothod as oonkka baaya» yeegeeza.
18.11: Yey gishos, Phawuloosa Xooss qaala asa tamaarssittar pettii laythinnee usuppun agina unttar betteeza.
18.12: Gaaloosa Akkaya biitta aqisodar Ayihuditay pettipp Phawuloosal afa denddii pirdde keethi kanggii,
18.13: «Yha athay higge ixxii, asay Xooss goynnoday garkk udiza» yeegeeza.
18.14: Phawuloosa nashshod hanodar, Gaaloosa Ayihuditayko, «Ayihuditayyo, yey iita ooso woy naaqo maaqqeezako taanii yi bagga danda7i si7odayis beeziza.
18.15: Zin qaalas, yi sunthayisinnee yi higgayis yi palamiza baz maaqqiko yi, yinttis billoytta; yeya taanii pirddaamii» yeegeeza.
18.16: Yeezii, unttan pirdda keethaypp bale kesseeza.
18.17: Yeypp guye, as ubbay Ayihude Woosa Keeth halaqa Sosteenisa aykkii pirdde keeth tiina yhadhdheeza. Zin Gaaloosas yey abkka aazekkaya. Phawuloosa Anxooka maaqqeeza
18.18: Phawuloosa gaame gallas Qoronttoosa betteezaypp guye ammaniza asa sarothi, Phirisqilirannee Aqiilara markkaber Soora yhanigeeza. Zin E yhanigodaypp tiina ees gatho yez gishos Kinkkiroosa katamayid fa omma meedeeza.
18.19: Unttii Efesoone hellii Phawuloosa Phirisqilannee Aqiila ezayid ashsheeza. Zin paas Ayihude Woosa Keethi gelii Ayihuditayira odintteeza.
18.20: Unttii paar gaame wode bettoday garkk Phawuloosana woosseeza zin E ixeeza.
18.21: Unttapp shaakinttii, «Xoossii giiko yinttiko maaqqii ye7oda» yeegii Efisonepp markkaber dendeeza.
18.22: Qisaare hellii Yerusalaame yhanigii woosa keeth asay sarotheezaypp guye Anxooka qiteeza.
18.23: Ezayid xiqqa wode gam7eezaypp guye taamarita asita ubba minthathittar Galatiyarannee Phirger aadheeza. Aphiloosa Efesoonalannee Qoronttoosala
18.24: Iskkinddire yeleta maaqqeez pettii Aphiloosa giz Ayihude as Efesoone qiteeza. E oda eriza asinnee Xooss qaala lo7ithii eriza asii.
18.25: E Goda oga taamarii, ayyanar xuuginttii Yesuusa bagga luule odizannee tamarisiza. Hano zin, Waannisa xinqqata aadda eriza.
18.26: E Ayihude Woosa keetha yashittekkazar taamarsseeza. Phirisqilannee Aqiila E odizana si7ii eza paar kara kanggii Xoossa oga tiinaasaypp aathii ees odeeza.
18.27: Aphiloosa Akkaza yhammadayis koyin Efesoona yez ammaniza asay e qofa ekkii Akkaya yez ammanizitay eza mokkoday garkk unttis dabddaabbe xaafeeza. E ezayid hellii Xooss aadho keehetithar Yesuus Kiristtoosa ammaneezita gaame maaddeeza.
18.28: Yesuusa E Kiristtoosa maaqqeezana Ayihuditayis Xooss qaalaypp qonccisii woya ubbay tiina miinthii taamarsseeza.

19.1: Aphiloosa Qoronttoosa yezin, Phawuloosa wookki bagga gader aadhii Efesoone helleeza. Ezayid pettii pettii ammaniza asita denggeeza.
19.2: Unttanakka, «Yi ammaneez wode Geesha Ayyana ekkeenee?» yeegii oyiceeza. Unttii, «wa77a, ekkekkaya; hara attozin, Geesha Ayyana yezanakka nu si7ekkaya» yeegeeza.
19.3: Phawuloosa unttiko, «Yeezin, yi abar xammaqintteenee?» yeegeeza. Unttii, «Nuunii Waannisa xinqqata xammaqintteeza» yeegii maheeza.
19.4: Phawuloosa, «Waannisa paapp guyer yi7iz Yesuusana asay ammanoday garkk asayis odittar, maarotithis beeziza xinqqata xammaqeeza» yeegeeza.
19.5: Unttii yeya si7ii Goda Yesuusa tamaarita maaqqodayis E sunthar xammaqintteeza gallas gallas Geeshsha Maxaafita nabbabiza.
19.6: Phawuloosa fa kusha unttal afa gaddin Geeshsha Ayyana unttal afa wodhdhin, duma duma doonar odintteeza; ma tinbbite odeeza.
19.7: Ye aqayid taphpho nam7e maaqqiz asitay yeza.
19.8: Phawuloosa Ayihude Woosa Keeth gelii, Xooss kaatetithii bagga yashittekkazar palamttarannee lo7ithii qonccisttar unttar hayidzii agina hellodayis gam7eeza.
19.9: Zin unttapp pettay pettay dhube maaqqii gaame asay tiina Goday oga cazhii ammanaam ixxeeza. Phawuloosa ammanizita unttapp shagii ekkii Xiranoosa giz timirtte keetha ubba wode unttan taamarsseeza.
19.10: Phawuloosa nam77ii layithi hellodayis qaala odeeza. Yey gishos, Iisiya yez as ubbay, Ayihuditayinnee Ayihude baazitay Goday qaala si7eeza. Xoossay Phawuloosa kushe ootheez malatita
19.11: Xoossay Phawuloosa kushe wolqqama malabazita ootheeza.
19.12: Yey gishos, asay e galla bochcheez maarabe woy ma7o harggintteez asayis kanggiza. Unttikka paxiza; tuna ayyanitaykka unttapp keziza.
19.13: Tuna ayyanita kessittar yuuyiza Ayihuditaypp pettay pettay, «Phawuloosa sabbakiza Yesuusa sunthayir kezoytta gi yinttan azaziza» yeegii, tuna gaalenitay aykkeez asitayil afa Goda Yesuusa suntha xeegeeza
19.14: Ayihude Qeese halaqitaypp petta maaqqeez Asqeewa ginttiz athayis yeya oothiza laappun dhiirath na7itay yeza.
19.15: Zin tuna ayyanay unttiko, «Taanii Yesuusakka Phawuloosa baggakka eriza, zin yinttii oonanttara?» yeegeeza.
19.16: Tuna ayyana aykkeez athay unttal afa doonggii wodhdhii, unttal madoth kessii, ye karitipp kallo laasii dhabod hellodayis wolqqamii gameeza.
19.17: Efesoona yez Ayihuditayinnee Ayihude baazitay ubbay yeya si7ii iita yashitteeza. Goda Yesuusa sunthay gaame bonchintteeza.
19.18: Ammanizitaypp gaamitay fa ootheez iita oosa buuxittarannee qoncce odittar yi7iza.
19.19: Murunitaypp gaamitay fa maxaafita shiishii as ubbay tiina micheeza. Ye maxaafitay waagay waagay ishatam mukule bira maaqqeeza.
19.20: Yey garkk hanii Xooss qaalay wolqqar diccittarannee dalggittar qiteeza. Efesoone katama cabbotithi dendeeza
19.21: Yey polintteezapp guye Phawuloosa, «Taanii Yerusalaame maaqqii Oroome yhammadayis beeziza» yeegii Maqadoonarannee Akkayara aadhii Yerusalaame yhammadayis qofa acceeza.
19.22: Ma fana maaddizitaypp nam7ita Ximaatoosannee Erasxoosa Maqadoona kiittii, paas Iisiya xiqqa wode gam7eeza.
19.23: Ye wode yha ogay gishos iita kachchii kezeeza.
19.24: Pettii bira oothiz Dimexiroosa ginttiz athay Arxemisa eeqa kara misile birapp medhdhii gaame wodhe denggizazin.
19.25: Yey gishos, yey garkk ooso oothizita pettipp shiishii, «Asayyo, nu duretithay yha oosaypp maaqqeezana yi eriza.
19.26: Phawuloosa, yhay ‹As kushe oosintteezitay Xooss baaya› yeegii, Efesoonarannee xiqqa biittitaypp attin muume Iisa biitta ubbayil yez gaame asayis odii ammantheezannee maheeza yi be7eezannee si7eeza.
19.27: Meto maaqqeezay, nu oosay leqintteezita aadda baazin Iisannee gade ubbayil yez as goynniza gita Xoossinnee Arxemisa karay odinttekka attodaynnee E damotithaykka wodhdhoday yashshiza» yeegeeza.
19.28: Asay yeya si7ii shener kumii, «Efisoona Arxemisa bayira» yeegii uukkeeza.
19.29: Ye uufay katama ubba helleeza. Phawuloosa laggita Maqadoona asita, Gaayoosannee Arsxirokoosa unttar wolla dafi ekkii kaa7iza aqa woxxeeza.
19.30: Phawuloosakka asay shiiqeez aqo gelodayis koyeeza, zin ammaneezitay eza kayeeza.
19.31: Iisa biitta halaqitaypp Phawuloosas zhame maaqqeez pettay pettay Phawuloosako kiittii, «kaa7iza aqo qonccer kezii benttippe» gi eza woosseeza.
19.32: Shiiqeez asayis hanod baz dhabeeza; gaanggiza bagga asay hara attozin abis shiiqeezako erekkazay gishos pettay pettibaz gi uukkiza ma yhankkitay hara baz gi uukkiza.
19.33: Ayihuditay Iskkinddirose giz atha woya ganccepp tiina urqqeez, pettii pettii asay E godbaza odin Ezii asay si77i goday garkk fa kushayir mallii beezii, asayis mootinttodayis eqqeeza.
19.34: Zin Iskkinddire Ayihude as maaqqeez asay erii nam77ii saate maaqqod hollodayis ubbay pettii qaalar, «Efesoona Arxemisa damma» yeegii uukkeeza.
19.35: Wurssitha ye Katamitii xaafay woya si7ii udii, «Efesoona aso! Efesoona katamay gita Arxemiisas eeqa karannee salopp wodhdheez, gita shuchch naagiza maaqqeezana eroowa as oonoo?
19.36: Yhaya lahiza as baa maaqqiko yi si77ii godayisnnee ellisii 7iita baz oothopp naaginttodayis beeziza.
19.37: Yi yha asita, eeqa keeth miishe kasttekkazitannee nu Xoossita cazhii be7ekkazita ke7eeza.
19.38: Yey gishos, Dimexiroosannee ezar yez oosanchchitay oorakka mootintto koykko, pirdde keethi yeza; daynnitaykka yeza; u mootodayiskka danda7iza.
19.39: Zini yi hara oda koykko, Shanggo shiiqol oday bi7intto.
19.40: Yey maaqqaam ixxiko yhayino haneezibazayis Oroome kaatetithay nuna oyicoda. Yha buqithayis gaaso baa gishos nuunii malsse mahodayis danda7ooya»

20.1: Cabbotithay hayizeezin Phawuloosa ammaniza asita xeegisii unttan minthatheezaypp guye sarothi Maqadoona yhammadayis kezeeza.
20.2: E aadhiz biittayid yez ammaniza asayis zore qaala odii minthatheezaypp guye Girike gade qiteeza.
20.3: E ezayid hayidzii agina bettii, markkaber Soora yhammadayis murttii yezin, Ayihuditay eza wodhodayis kozhizana erii Maqadoonar guye maaqqodayis kozheeza.
20.4: Phawuloosa moyizeeza Beerappe Pharhuusa na7a Sophaxiroosa, Teselonqqepp Arsxirokoosannee Sikondduusa, Derbbepp Gaayoosa, Iisiyapp Tikiqoosa, Xirofimoosannee Ximaatoosa.
20.5: Yeyititay tiina yhanigii nuna Xiro7aadal naagiza.
20.6: Nuunii boora Baale bonchcheezaypp guye Pilphisoosapp markkaber denddii, ichchintha gallas unttan Xiro7aada hellii ezayid laappun gallas gam7eeza. Awuxikoosa Xiro7aada yhamadayis dendeeza
20.7: Saaminttapp tiina gallas nuunii boora wolla maadayis shiiqii yezin, Phawuloosa wonttitha yhammadayis qoppeez gishos unttis qaala odittar giddii bilahe hellodayis oda adussiseeza.
20.8: Nuunii shiiqii betteez pooqayil poo7o wazhzhii geezin.
20.9: Ewuxikoosa ginttiz pettii paanthay maskkootel afa bettii, fana dogii gentteeza. Phawuloosa oda adusseezaypp Ewuxikoosa gentta aafer hayidzintho pooqaypp wodhdhii yhayqqeezana asay dentheeza.
20.10: Zin Phawuloosa wodhdhii, ezal afa xuggunii. Eza idinggii, «E yhayqqekkaya, hirigipatte» yeegeeza.
20.11: Yeypp guye, fude pooqeel afa kezii boora baxxii meeza. Sa7a wonttod hellodayis asayis odeezaypp guye denddii qiteeza.
20.12: Ye paxeez pantha kara kanggii gaame ufaytteeza. Phawuloosa Xiro7aadapp Milixe qiteeza
20.13: Zin Phawuloosa fana ezaypp mokkoday garkk nuus odeezay gishos nu tiinatii markkabekko yhanigii, Asoona yhammadayis denddeeza. Abis giiko, E toker yhammadayis qoppeez gishos nuna yey garkk azazeeza.
20.14: E nuna Asoona hellin markkaber eza ekkii Mixiline ye7eeza.
20.15: Wonttitha gallas ezaypp denddii markkaber Kiyoosas tiina baggar yez aqa helleeza; ma wonttitha gallas Saamosa piinggii kaalliza gallas Millixe helleeza.
20.16: Phawuloosa Iisiya gaame gam7odayis koyekka gishos Efesoone kanttar aadhodayis qoppeeza. Paas danda7inttiko Phenxeqosxe Baale gallas Yerusalaame hellodayis ellisiza. Phawuloosa Efesoone cimitana zoreeza
20.17: Phawuloosa Miliixepp Efesoona kiittii woosa keeth cimita xeegiseeza.
20.18: Woosa keeth cimitay eziko yi7in, unttiko yhay garkk yeegeeza: «Taanii Iisa geleez tiina gallasapp aykkii yinttar yezeez wode ubbayid wayizii yezeezako yi eriza.
20.19: Ayihuditay maqinttii taal afa meto helthikokka taanii haayotitharannee gaame aafuthar Godayis ootheeza.
20.20: Ayidekka yi kara kara yinttan tamaarssittar yinttan maaddeezaypp pettibazikka pacinchekkaya.
20.21: Taanii Ayihuditayisinnee Ayihude baazitayis nagarapp Xoossiko maaqqoday garkkennee nu Goda Yesuusa ammanoday garkk markatteeza.
20.22: «Ezayid tana abi hellodazako erooya, yhatti taanii Geeshsha Ayyaanas kiitinttii Yerusalaame yhanigiza:
20.23: Zin Geeshsha Ayyanay achchinnee waaye tana naagizana katama ubbayid taas markkatteeza.
20.24: Zin ta laaso polodayisnnee Goda Yesuusapp ekkeez oosa, Xooss aadho keehatith Wonggile markkattiza poliza ta shemppato pathoowa baz garkk payidiza.
20.25: «Taanii yhattekka Xooss kaatetith markkattittar yi ubbitay ganccer yuuyeeza. Yikkepp guye yinttipp oonkka tana be7aamana eriza.
20.26: Yey gishos, yinttipp pettii as dhabikokka ta oycinttaamana yhayino yinttis milxi udii odiza.
20.27: Xooss zore ubba yinttis abikka ashshekkazar odeeza.
20.28: «Fa aaddas fa suuthar wozeez Xoossa woosa keetha naagoytta. Geeshsha Ayyanay yinttan wude henggizita udii shuumeez wudayisinnee yi ubbayis naaginttoytta.
20.29: Taanii yhanigeezaypp guye, wudayis qadhinttoowa iita pugitay yi gancce gelodana ta eriza.
20.30: Ammanizita fa lassa kaalithiza worddo asitamaaritay yi ganccepp dendoda.
20.31: Yey gishos, taanii hayidzii laythi qammannee gallas aafuthar yinttan ommas ommas minthatheeza qoppittar naaginttoytta.
20.32: «Yhattekka yinttan minthodayis geeshsh asayir laatisodayis danda7iza Xoossisinnee E aadho keehateth qaalayis yinttan hadara inggiza.
20.33: «Taanii ooppekka bira woy worqqa woy afila amottekkaya.
20.34: Taanii ta kusher oothii tanannee taar yezita koshshiza baz maaddeeza yi, yi ommas eriza.
20.35: Yi yhay garkk daaburii oothittar daabureezita maaddodayannee Goda Yesuusa, ‹Ekkizaypp inggizay anjjintteeza› geez qaala yi qoppodayis beeziza taanii yinttan ubba bazar beezeeza» yeegeeza.
20.36: Phawuloosa yeya odii haasii u ubbitayira gulbatii Xoossa woosseeza.
20.37: U ubbitaykka Phawuloosana idinggii yeekkittar yeereeza.
20.38: E mahii, «Yhayinopp guye tana yi be7aamii» yeegeez qaalay unttan iita azzantheeza. Unttii markkaba hellodayis eza moyizeeza.

21.1: Nuunii Efesoona cimitaypp shaakintteezan garkk markkaber Qoose yhanigeeza. Wonttitha gallas Ruude hellii ezaypp Phaxira yhanigeeza.
21.2: Pinqqe piinggiz markkabe denggii ezayid gelii yhammadayis denddeeza.
21.3: Nuunii Qoophiroosa be7eezan garkk, haddirss bagga ashshii Soora yhanigeeza. Markkabay fa caana ezayid wothodayis koyeez gishos Xiroosa yhanigeeza.
21.4: Ezayid ammaniza asita denggeeza unttar laappun gallas betteeza. Phawuloosa Yerusalaame yhanggaamay garkk unttii ees Ayyanar odeeza.
21.5: Nuunii unttar bettiza woday wurin kezii yhanigeeza. Unttii ubbay fa machchitayrannee fa na7itayir pettii katamapp gaxa kessii nuna moyizeeza. Nuunii abba lanqqe bunqqittii Xoossa woosseeza.
21.6: Yeypp guye, woli sarothi nu markkabayid geleeza; unttikka fa kara maaqqeeza.
21.7: Nuunii abbal afar oga haasii, Xiroosapp Phexelemasa helleeza. Ezayid ammaniza asita sarothi, u kale pettii gallas peezheeza.
21.8: Wonttitha gallas kezii, Qisaare yhanigeeza. Sabaake Filphoosa kara hellii e kale betteeza. E Yerusalaame tiin doorintteez laappunitaypp petta.
21.9: Filphoosas nabe maaqqeez oyddii wudir na7itay yeza.
21.10: Nuunii unddenna gallas ezayid bettii yezin Agaboosa giz nabay Yihudapp Qisaare ye7eeza.
21.11: Nuuko yi7ii Phawuloosapp saqqa ekkii fa kushannee fa toka accii, «Geeshsha Ayyanay yha saqqay goda, Yerusalaame Ayihuditay yhay garkk accii, Ayihude maaqqekka asayis aathii immada yeegiza» yeegeeza.
21.12: Nuunii yeya si7ii nuunnee ezayid yez asitay Phawuloosa Yerusalaame yhanggaamay garkk woosseeza.
21.13: Zin Phawuloosa mahii, «Yi yhay garkk yeekkittar abis ta wozina shugishe? Taanii, Goda Yesuusa sunthay gishos achch aadda baazin Yerusalaame yhayqqodayisikka giigintteeza» yeegeeza.
21.14: Nu zora E ekkaam ixxin, «Goday shene maaqqo» yeegii si7ii geeza.
21.15: Ezayid xiqqa wode gam7eezaypp guye giiginttii Yerusalaame yhammadayis kezeeza.
21.16: Qisaare yez ammaniza asitaypp xiqqitay nuur yhanigoytta geeza. Unttii nuunii shemppodayis Minasoona giz Qoophiroosa athay kara kanggeeza. Minasoona tiin ammaneez asaypp petta. Phawuloosa Yerusalaame helleeza
21.17: Nuunii Yerusalaame hellin ammaniza asay nuna ufayssar mokkeeza.
21.18: Wonttitha gallas Phawuloosa nuur wolla Yayqqoobako yhanigeeza. Woosa keeth cimitay ubbitaykka ezayid yeza.
21.19: Phawuloosa unttan sarotheezaypp guye Ayihude maaqqekka asay gancce fa baggar Xoossii ootheezi bazita ubba unttis odeeza.
21.20: Unttii yeya si7ii Xoossa galatii Phawuloosako yhay garkk yeegeeza: «Nu ishayyo, Ayihuditay gancce aappun mukulitay Xoossa ammaneezako ne bi7iza; unttii ubbaykka higga miinthii naagiza.
21.21: Neenii Ayihude baazitay biitta yez Ayihude ubbay fa na7ita dookalamay garkk, Ayihuditay woga kaallaamay garkkennee Muse higga ixxoday garkk neenii taamarssizana Yerusalaame yez Ayihuditay si7eeza.
21.22: Yeezin abi lo77o? Neenii ye7itha tumakka u si7oda.
21.23: «Yey gishos, nuunii nees odizana si7oba; gatho yez oyddii asitay nu kale yeza.
21.24: Unttan ekkii unttara geezhoba; ma unttii fa omma meedinttoday garkk unttis miishe inggoba. Unttii tiina nees si7eezay tuma baazannee neenii ne ubbaskka higge naagiza as maaqqeezana ubbay eroda.
21.25: «Zin ammaneez Ayihude maaqqekka asita maaqqiko, unttii eeqas yarshintteez baz maamay garkk, suuth uzhaamay garkk, bawuta maamay garkkennee lagitaamay garkk, nuunii oda accii, unttis dabddaabbe xaafeeza» yeegeeza.
21.26: Yeypp guye, Phawuloosa wonttitha gallas asita ekkii, yhanigeeza. E fa geezhiz gallasay ayide polinttodazako ersodayisnnee fa yarshsho ayide yarshodazako erisodayis Xooss Keetha geleeza. Phawuloosa aykintteeza
21.27: Laappun gallasay wurod hanodar, Iisapp ye7eez Ayihuditay Xooss keetha Phawuloosa bi7ii, as ubba denthithii Phawuloosa aykkeeza.
21.28: «Isreele asayyo, nuna maaddoytta; yha athay, nu higgannee yha Xooss Karana ixxoday garkk as ubba ubba aqo taamarssiza athay yhaya. Yeykka gidaam ixxin Ayihude baazita Xooss Kara gelssii, yha geeshsh aqa tuniseeza» yeegii uukkeeza.
21.29: Unttii yeya geezay tiina Efesoona Xirofimoosana Phawuloosar wola katamayid be7eez gishos yhatti Phawuloosa Xooss kara eza ekkii geleezbaz unttis aazeeza.
21.30: Katama ubbay sharkkisharkeeza; asii ubbay shiiqii Phawuloosa aykkii Xooss Karapp goochchii bale kesseeza. Xooss Kara pengitay ellisii gorddintteeza.
21.31: Asay Phawuloosa wodhod hanodar, «Yerusalaame katama kunithay buqqintteeza» giz oday Oroome shaalaqayiko helleeza.
21.32: Shaalaqay wottaddaritannee mato halaqita ekkii laasttar ye7eeza. Asay shaalaqannee wottaaddarita bi7ii Phawuloosa yhadhdhizana ashsheeza.
21.33: Ye wode shaalaqay shiiqii, Phawuloosa aykkii, nam77ii santhalaater acinttoday garkk azazeeza. Yeezii, E oonazakonnee ab udeezako asa oycceeza.
21.34: Asaypp baggay yhaya gi uukkodar yhankkitay yeya gi uukkiza. Cabbotay dareez gishos shaalaqay tuma shaakkodayis danda7inttaam ixxin, wotaaddaritay Phawuloosa fa yeza aqo kanggoday garkk azazeeza.
21.35: Phawuloosa yedhdhii kezeez detha hellodar as urqqithay gishos wotaaddaritay eza tookkeeza.
21.36: Gaame asay, «E yhayqqo!» yeegii ukkittar kaaliza. Phawuloosa mootayis mahith inggeeza
21.37: Wotaaddaritay Phawuloosa fa yeza aqo gelssod hanodar, Phawuloosa shaalaqayiko, «Ta nees pettibaz ododay garkk udodee?» yeegeeza. E Phawuloosako, «Neenii Girike doona erinee?
21.38: Neenii yhaypp tiina buqithi medhdhii shemppo wodhdheez oyddii mukule asita ekkii liizho gadha geleez Gibxxe athay nena baasa?» yeegeeza.
21.39: Zin Phawuloosa, «Taanii, Kilqqa yez erintteez Terssese katama as maaqqeez Ayihude asii. Hayyana tana asayis odisooye?» yeegeeza.
21.40: Shaalaqay eziko, «Odoba» yeegin Phawuloosa dethal afa eqqii, asay si77i goday garkk fa kusher maleeza. Asay si77i gin Ibraysxe doonar yhay garkk yeegeeza:

22.1: «Ta ishuntho, ta aduntho, taanii yhatti yinttis inggiza malssa si7oytta.»
22.2: Phawuloosa unttis Ibraysxe doonar odiza si7ii kaseesaypp aathii si7ii ateeza. E yeegeeza,
22.3: «Taanii Kilqqa yez Xerseese yelinttii yha katamayid dicceeza. Ta asitamaaraykka Gamaalale; taanii nu aditay higga miinthii tamaareeza, yhayino yi ubbay hanizay garkk Xoossayis mishinttiza Ayihude asii.
22.4: Taanii yha oga kaalliza maachchitayinnee dhiirathita aykkii achch keetha olittarannee unttan wodhisod hellodayis meto beezeez asii.
22.5: Yey garkkekka, qeese halaqaynnee Shanggo ubbay tabaz markkattodayis danda7iza. Taanii Damasqqo yez u ishitayis unttapp dabddaabbe ekkii ezayid yez asitay acinttii seerinttod garkk Yerusalaame ko7odayis yhanigeeza.»
22.6: «Taanii yhanigii Damasqqo hellodar seeta gallas qoppekka salopp gita poo7o ta kalayir poo7eeza.
22.7: Taanii sa7a pokkii yezin, ‹Saa7oola, Saa7oola, tana abis bayi7inee?› giz qaala si7eeza.
22.8: Taanii mahii, ‹Godayyo, neenii oonoo?› yeegeeza. «E mahii, ‹Taanii, ne bayi7ithiz Naazirete Yesuusa› yeegeeza.
22.9: Taar yezitay poo7a be7eezaypp attin taas odiza qaala si7ekkaya.
22.10: «Taanii, ‹Godayyo, ta ab udo?› yeegeeza. «Goday taako, ‹Denddii Damasqqo yhanigoba. Ne udoday garkk Xooss qoppeezibaz ubba baz ezayid nees odinttoda› yeegeeza.
22.11: Ye wolqqama poo7aypp denddeezayid ta aafay be7aam ixin, taar yez asitay ta kusha aykkii, tana goochchin Damasqqo helleeza.
22.12: «Damasqqo yez Ayihude ubbay unddenna bonchchiza pettii Hanana giz athay, nu higga bonchchizaynnee Xoossa miinthii woossizay yeza.
22.13: Hanana taako yi7ii, ta kale eqqii, ‹Ta ishayyo Saa7oola, bo7oba› yeegeeza. Ellisii taanii eza be7o aykkeeza.
22.14: «E taako, ‹Nu aditay Xoossay neenii e shene eroday garkk, xilla be7aday garkkennee e doonapp qaala si7oday garkk tiinatii nena dooreeza.
22.15: Ne be7eezbazinnee si7eez baz as ubba tiina ees markka maaqqoda.
22.16: Yhatti abis gam7ee? Denddii xammaqinttoba; e suntha xeegittar ne nagaraypp meecinttoba› yeegeeza.
22.17: «Taanii guye Yerusalaame maaqqii Xooss keetha woosodar, taas qonccithii bentteeza.
22.18: Qonccithar Goday taako, ‹Ne taas markkattiz markkatitha asay ekkeka gishos ellisii Yerusalaamepp kezoba› yeegodar ta be7eeza.
22.19: «Taanii, ‹Godayyo, Ayihude Woosa Keeth ubbayid nena ammanizita aykkii yadhdheezannee achch kara oleeza unttii eriza.
22.20: Unttii ne markka Isxifaanose wodhodar taanii ye odayid asayir tobbeeza. Ma u kale eqqii eza wodheezitayis ma7o naagiza› yeegeeza.
22.21: «Goday taako, ‹Taanii nena Ayihude maaqqekka asayiko haakko aqo kiitteezay gishos denddii qitoba› » yeegeeza. Phawuloosa Oroome as maaqqeezana qoncciseeza
22.22: Phawuloosa ye qaala odii haasod hellodayis asay E giza si7iza. Yeypp guye, fa qaala dhoqq udii, «Yhaya biittaypp dhabisoba! E shemppor yezodayis beezooya» yeegeeza.
22.23: Unttii uukkittarannee, fa ma7o afa dakkittarannee baana afa denthodar;
22.24: Shaalaqay bi7ii wotaaddaritay Phawuloosana u fa yeza aqo kanggoday garkk azazeeza. Ma asay abis yey garkk uukkizako erodayis koyii Phawuloosa alanggar garafii pilagoday garkk unttan azazeeza.
22.25: Zin wotaaddaritay Phawuloosa dafer miinthii accii garafod hanodar Phawuloosa fa kale eqqeez mato halaqitayiko, «Oroome as pirdda bayith garafizay yinttis woga?» yeegeeza.
22.26: Mato halaqay yeya si7ii shaalaqayiko yhanigii, «Yha athay Oroome asii. Neenii ab oothodayis qoppeenee?» yeegii oycceeza.
22.27: Shaalaqay Phawuloosako shiiqii, «Neenii Oroome aso? An taas odoba» yeegeeza. Phawuloosa, «Ee» yeegeeza.
22.28: Shaalaqay mahii, «Taanii yha gadetitha gaame miisher wonggeeza» yeegeeza. Zin Phawuloosa, «Ta yha gadetitha yeletithar denggii ekkeeza» yeegeeza.
22.29: Yey gishos, Phawuloosa pilagodayis qoppeezitay izir eepp shaakintteeza. Shaalaqay Oroome as maaqqeezana erii acciseezayis yashshitteeza. Phawuloosa Ayihude shanggo tiina shiiqeeza
22.30: Wonttitha gallas Shaalaqay, Ayihuditay Phawuloosa abis mooteezako geeshshii erodayis koyeeza. Qeese halaqitayinnee shanggo ubbay shiiqoday garkk azazeeza; ma Phawuloosa achchapp bili7isii u tiina esseeza.

23.1: Phawuloosa shanggana dakkii bi7ii, «Ta ishuntho, taanii yhayino hellodayis Xooss tiina ta yess ubbayid lo77o wozinar yeza» yeegeeza.
23.2: Qeese halaqay Hanana, Phawuloosa doonate baqqoday garkk e kale eqqeezana azazeeza.
23.3: Ye wode Phawuloosa eeko, «Naati ne borshontto tizheez gabbara aazizayo, Xoossay nena baqqoda. Neenii taal afa higge garkk pirddodayis bettii higge menth tana baqqoday garkk kiittinee?» yeegeeza.
23.4: Phawuloosa kantta eqqeezitay eeko, «Ne Xooss qeese halaqa cazhinee?» yeegeeza.
23.5: Phawuloosa, «Ta ishuntho, E qeese halaqa maaqqeeza ta erekkaya; abis giiko Xooss qaalayid, ‹Ne woya aqisizayil afa iita qaala odippe› ginttinttii xaafintteeza» yeegeeza.
23.6: Zin Phawuloosa ye aqayid yez asaypp baggitay Saduqaawita, baggitay Ferisaawita maaqqeezana erii, «Ta ishuntho, taanii Ferisaawennee Ferisaawe na7a; ‹yhayqqeezitay yhayiqopp dendoda› gi taanii ufayisar naagiza gishos unttii taal afa pirddiza» yeegii odeeza.
23.7: Phawuloosa yeya geez wode Ferisaawitay ganccennee Saduqaawitay gancce kachchii kezin shaakintteeza.
23.8: Abis giiko, Saduqaawitay, «Yhayqqeez as dendooya; kiitanchchoka ayyankka baaya» yeegiza. Zin Ferisaawitay ubbakka ammaniza.
23.9: Ola uufo keseeza; Ferisaawitay bagga maaqqeez higge asitamaaritay denddii eqqii, «Yha athayil afa aba buutakka dengeekkaya; ees ayyana woy kiitanchchay odo attenna» yeegii palameeza.
23.10: Kachchay mee7ith aykkin asay Phawuloosa shaqirchchaamaygarkk gi, shaalaqay fa wotaaddaritay wodhdhii unttan ganccepp eza ellisii kessii u fa yeza aqo kanggodaygarkk azazeeza.
23.11: Ye qamma Goday Phawuloosa kale eqqii, «Phawloosa, neenii taas Yerusalaame markkatteeza Oroomekka markkattodayis beeziza; minggoba; akko baaya» yeegeeza. Phawuloosana wodhodayis maqintteeza
23.12: Wonttitha gallas Ayihuditay, «Phawuloosana wodhekazar katha maamii haath uzhaamii» gi caaqqeeza.
23.13: Phawuloosal afa yeya maaqqintteez asitay oytamapp gaame.
23.14: Unttii qeese halaqitaykonnee gade cimatayko yhanigii, «Nuunii Phawuloosa wodhekkazar katha gizibaz maamii gi caaqqeez.
23.15: Yikkee, yinttan shanggay ebaz geeshshii pilagodibaz yez aazisii, Phawuloosa yinttiko ko7oday garkk shalaqa oycoytta. Nuunii E yha shiiqo hellodaypp tiina eza wodhodayis giigii betteeza» yeegeeza.
23.16: Zin Phawuloosa mishii na7ay ye maaqqintta si7ii yhanigii wotaaddaritay yeza aqo gelii, Phawuloosas odeeza.
23.17: Phawuloosa mato halaqitaypp petta xeegii, «Yha na7ay shaalaqayis odiza baz yeza gishos eza shalaqayko kanggoba» yeegeeza.
23.18: Mato halaqay na7a shaalaqayiko kanggii, «Achch kara yez Phawuloosa tana faako xeegii, yha na7ay nees odiza baz yez gishos eza neeko ko7oday garkk tana woosseeza» yeegeeza.
23.19: Shaalaqay na7ay kushayid aykkii, duma bale kessii, «Neenii taas ododbazay abba?» yeegii oycceez.
23.20: Na7ay shaalaqayiko, «Ayihuditay Phawuloosa bagga kasepp miinthii pilagodayis koyeezi baz aazisii neenii wontta eza shiiqo ko7oday garkk nena woossodayis zore acceeza.
23.21: Zin neenii unttii gizibaz si7ippe. Abis giiko, oytamapp gaame asitay Phawuloosa wodhekkazar ‹Katha maamii, haathe uzhaamii› gi caaqqii, qosinttii eza naagiza. Yhatti ne gizibaz aadda si7odayis naagiza» yeegeeza.
23.22: Shaalaqay mahii, «Yhaya ne taas odeezana hara ooskka odippe» yeegii na7a guye dakkeeza. Phawuloosana Filkkiseko dakkeeza
23.23: Shaalaqay mato halaqitaypp nam77ita xeegii, «Qammapp hayidzii saater Qisaare yhanigodayis, nam77ii xeet wotaaddarita, laappun tam para asitannee nam77ii xeet tooranchchita giigisoytta.
23.24: Gade aqisiza Filkkisako Phawuloosa saror helloday garkk toga mehita giigisoytta» yeegii u azazeeza.
23.25: Shaalaqay Filkkisas yhay garkk giz dabddaabbe xaafeeza:
23.26: «Qalawudoosa Lusosappe gade aqisiza bonchcho Filkkisas, saro nees maaqqo.
23.27: Ayihuditay yha atha aykkii wodhod hanodar, E Oroome gade as maaqqeezaya erii wotaaddaritayira hellii eza ashsheeza.
23.28: Ta Unttii eza abis mootizako erodayis koyii unttan u shanggitayiko eza shiisheeza.
23.29: Unttii fa higgayis eza mooteezaypp attin eza wodhisizabaz woy acisizibaz baza ta denggeeza.
23.30: Unttii yha athayil afa maaqqintteez zigirssay tana hellin, taanii ellisii eza neeko dakkeeza. Eza mootizitay ne tiina yhanigii mootoday garkk azazeeza» yeegeeza.
23.31: Yey gishos, wotaaddarita azazeezay garkk Phawuloosa ekkii, qamma Antiphaxirisa helitheeza.
23.32: Wonttitha gallas paar asitay eza ekkii yhammaday garkk ashshii toke asitay guye maaqqeeza.
23.33: Togar yez asay Qisaare hellii dabddaabbe gade aqisizayis inggii, Phawuloosana e tiina shiisheeza.
23.34: Gade aqisizay dabddaabba nabbabeezaypp guye «Phawuloosa, ne aba awurajja aso?» gi eza oyiceeza. E Kilqa as maaqqeezaya erii
23.35: «Taanii nena mootizitay yi7iko ne giza si7oda» yeegeeza. Wotaaddaritay Phawuloosa Herodoosa zabba naaginttoday garkk azazeeza.

24.1: Ichchin gallasappe guye qeese halaqay Hananee, cimitayirannee Xerxeluusa giz pettii afakatayir wolla Qisaare qiteeza. Unttii gade aqisizayil afa Phawuloosana mooteeza.
24.2: Phawuloosa xeeginttii geleez wode Xerxeluusa eza yhay garkk yeegii mooteeza: «Bonchcho Filkkisa, nuunii ne baggar unddenna sarotith denggeeza, ne lo77o aqisayid nu biittay unddenna laamintteeza.
24.3: Bonchchintteez Filkkisa, nuunii abakka ayidekka maaqqin unddenna galatar yeya ekkoda.
24.4: Taanii nena gam7isekkazar neenii ne keehetithayir nubaz eller si7od garkk nena woosiza.
24.5: Yha athay dhube maaqqii gade ubbayid yez Ayihuditay gancce cabbo medhdhii Naazirawitay bagga asa kaalithiza maaqqeezana nu ereeza.
24.6: Hara attozin, Xooss Kara tunisod hanodar nu eza aykkeeza; nu higgay gizay garkk ezal afa pirddodayis qoppeeza.
24.7: Zini shalaqa Luusiyosa yi7ii, wolqqar nu kusheppe eza kessii ekkeeza.
24.8: Ezar mootinttizitaykka neeko ye7od garkk azazeeza. Neenii ne ommas yha atha pilagii nu eza mootiza moota ubba erodayis danda7iza» yeegeeza.
24.9: Ayihuditaykka, «Yha oday tuma» gi e qofa ma7eeza. Phawuloosa mootayis mahith inggeeza
24.10: Gade aqisizay Phawuloosa odod garkk mallin Phawuloosa yhay garkk yeegi maheeza: «Neenii unddenna wodepp aykkii, yha asayis pirddittar yezana erii taanii odayis ufayssar mahith ingiza.
24.11: Taanii goynnodayis Yerusalaame kezin taphpho nam7i gallasapp aadhoozana neenii ne ommas erodayis danda7iza.
24.12: Ayihuditay tana Xooss kara maaqqin Ayihude Woosa kara maaqqin katama maaqqin oorakka palamodar woy as shiishii saro dhabisodayis tobbodar pettii asikka tana denggekkaya.
24.13: Yhattekka unttii tana mootizabazayis markka denggodayis danda7ooya.
24.14: «Zini taanii pettibaz ammaniza; taanii higger yezabazinnee nabitay xaafeez ubba baz ammanii, nu aditay Xoossa, unttikka worddo giz ogayir ta goynniza.
24.15: Unttii fa aaddas ammanizay ta garkk xillitayinnee xillobaazitayikk yhayiqopp dendodana taakka ammaniza.
24.16: Yey gishos, taanii Xooss tiinannee as tiina ubba wode lo77o kaha taas yezoday garkk miinggiza.
24.17: «Taanii Yerusalaameppe kezeezaypp unddenna laythapp guye ta dabo manqqitayis maadee immadayisinnee yarshsho yarshshodayis Yerusalaame yhanigeeza.
24.18: Taanii Xooss kara yeya udii qasho woga polii maaqqin tana denggeeza. Ye wode taara gaame woya baaya, kachchikka kezekkaya.
